      256 +// ── WebRTC fallback hook (no Zoom SDK required) ───────────────────────────────   
      257 +                                                                                    
      258 +export interface WebRTCParticipant {                                                
      259 +  userId: string;                                                                   
      260 +  nickname: string;                                                                 
      261 +  isMicActive: boolean;                                                             
      262 +  isCameraActive: boolean;                                                          
      263 +  role: "host" | "guest" | "vip";                                                   
      264 +}                                                                                   
      265 +                                                                                    
      266 +export interface UseWebRTCMediaReturn {                                             
      267 +  localStream: MediaStream | null;                                                  
      268 +  participants: WebRTCParticipant[];                                                
      269 +  isHost: boolean;                                                                  
      270 +  isMicActive: boolean;                                                             
      271 +  isCameraActive: boolean;                                                          
      272 +  isSDKReady: boolean;                                                              
      273 +  initLocalMedia: () => Promise<MediaStream | null>;                                
      274 +  toggleMic: () => void;                                                            
      275 +  toggleCamera: () => void;                                                         
      276 +  muteParticipant: (userId: string) => void;                                        
      277 +  unmuteParticipant: (userId: string) => void;                                      
      278 +  muteAll: () => void;                                                              
      279 +  transferHost: (userId: string) => void;                                           
      280 +  setIsHost: (v: boolean) => void;                                                  
      281 +}                                                                                   
      282 +                                                                                    
      283 +export function useWebRTCMedia(): UseWebRTCMediaReturn {                            
      284 +  const [localStream, setLocalStream] = useState<MediaStream | null>(null);         
      285 +  const [participants, setParticipants] = useState<WebRTCParticipant[]>([]);        
      286 +  const [isHost, setIsHost] = useState(false);                                      
      287 +  const [isMicActive, setIsMicActive] = useState(false);                            
      288 +  const [isCameraActive, setIsCameraActive] = useState(false);                      
      289 +  const [isSDKReady, setIsSDKReady] = useState(false);                              
      290 +                                                                                    
      291 +  const streamRef = useRef<MediaStream | null>(null);                               
      292 +                                                                                    
      293 +  const initLocalMedia = useCallback(async (): Promise<MediaStream | null> => {     
      294 +    try {                                                                           
      295 +      const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({                    
      296 +        video: { width: 1280, height: 720, facingMode: "user" },                    
      297 +        audio: { echoCancellation: true, noiseSuppression: true },                  
      298 +      });                                                                           
      299 +      streamRef.current = stream;                                                   
      300 +      setLocalStream(stream);                                                       
      301 +      setIsCameraActive(true);                                                      
      302 +      setIsMicActive(true);                                                         
      303 +      setIsSDKReady(true);                                                          
      304 +      return stream;                                                                
      305 +    } catch (err) {                                                                 
      306 +      console.warn("[useWebRTCMedia] Camera/mic not available:", err);              
      307 +      setIsSDKReady(true); // mark ready even without camera                        
      308 +      return null;                                                                  
      309 +    }                                                                               
      310 +  }, []);                                                                           
      311 +                                                                                    
      312 +  const toggleMic = useCallback(() => {                                             
      313 +    const stream = streamRef.current;                                               
      314 +    if (!stream) return;                                                            
      315 +    stream.getAudioTracks().forEach(t => { t.enabled = !t.enabled; });              
      316 +    setIsMicActive(prev => !prev);                                                  
      317 +  }, []);                                                                           
      318 +                                                                                    
      319 +  const toggleCamera = useCallback(() => {                                          
      320 +    const stream = streamRef.current;                                               
      321 +    if (!stream) return;                                                            
      322 +    stream.getVideoTracks().forEach(t => { t.enabled = !t.enabled; });              
      323 +    setIsCameraActive(prev => !prev);                                               
      324 +  }, []);                                                                           
      325 +                                                                                    
      326 +  const muteParticipant = useCallback((userId: string) => {                         
      327 +    setParticipants(prev =>                                                         
      328 +      prev.map(p => p.userId === userId ? { ...p, isMicActive: false } : p)         
      329 +    );                                                                              
      330 +  }, []);                                                                           
      331 +                                                                                    
      332 +  const unmuteParticipant = useCallback((userId: string) => {                       
      333 +    setParticipants(prev =>                                                         
      334 +      prev.map(p => p.userId === userId ? { ...p, isMicActive: true } : p)          
      335 +    );                                                                              
      336 +  }, []);                                                                           
      337 +                                                                                    
      338 +  const muteAll = useCallback(() => {                                               
      339 +    setParticipants(prev => prev.map(p => ({ ...p, isMicActive: false })));         
      340 +  }, []);                                                                           
      341 +                                                                                    
      342 +  const transferHost = useCallback((userId: string) => {                            
      343 +    setParticipants(prev =>                                                         
      344 +      prev.map(p => ({                                                              
      345 +        ...p,                                                                       
      346 +        role: p.userId === userId ? "host" : p.role === "host" ? "guest" : p.role,  
      347 +      }))                                                                           
      348 +    );                                                                              
      349 +    setIsHost(false);                                                               
      350 +  }, []);                                                                           
      351 +                                                                                    
      352 +  // Cleanup on unmount                                                             
      353 +  useEffect(() => () => {                                                           
      354 +    streamRef.current?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop());                          
      355 +  }, []);                                                                           
      356 +                                                                                    
      357 +  return {                                                                          
      358 +    localStream,                                                                    
      359 +    participants,                                                                   
      360 +    isHost,                                                                         
      361 +    isMicActive,                                                                    
      362 +    isCameraActive,                                                                 
      363 +    isSDKReady,                                                                     
      364 +    initLocalMedia,                                                                 
      365 +    toggleMic,                                                                      
      366 +    toggleCamera,                                                                   
      367 +    muteParticipant,                                                                
      368 +    unmuteParticipant,                                                              
      369 +    muteAll,                                                                        
      370 +    transferHost,                                                                   
      371 +    setIsHost,                                                                      
      372 +  };                                                                                
      373 +}

      327 +export function LocalVideoTile({ nickname, className = "", style }: LocalVideoTilePr
          +ops) {

  STEP 1 — Supabase setup instructions (add as README.md section):                                    
                                                                                                      
  Create SETUP.md in project root with:                                                               
                                                                                                      
  # L'Oxygène Setup Guide                                                                             
                                                                                                      
  ## Supabase Setup                                                                                   
  1. Go to https://supabase.com and create free account                                               
  2. Create new project (name: loxygene)                                                              
  3. Go to Settings → API                                                                             
  4. Copy: Project URL and anon/public key                                                            
  5. Paste into .env.local:                                                                           
     NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://xxxx.supabase.co                                                
     NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=eyJxxx...                                                          
                                                                                                      
  6. Go to SQL Editor in Supabase dashboard                                                           
  7. Copy and run the contents of lib/supabase/schema.sql                                             
                                                                                                      
  ## Zoom Video SDK Setup                                                                             
  1. Go to https://marketplace.zoom.us                                                                
  2. Create account → Build App → Video SDK                                                           
  3. Copy SDK Key and SDK Secret                                                                      
  4. Paste into .env.local:                                                                           
     NEXT_PUBLIC_ZOOM_SDK_KEY=xxx                                                                     
     NEXT_PUBLIC_ZOOM_SDK_SECRET=xxx                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  ## YouTube Data API Setup                                                                           
  1. Go to https://console.cloud.google.com                                                           
  2. Create project → Enable YouTube Data API v3                                                      
  3. Create credentials → API Key                                                                     
  4. Paste into .env.local:                                                                           
     NEXT_PUBLIC_YOUTUBE_API_KEY=xxx                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  ---                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  STEP 2 — Create app/api/zoom-signature/route.ts:                                                    
                                                                                                      
  Zoom SDK requires a JWT signature generated server-side:                                            
                                                                                                      
  import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';                                            
  import crypto from 'crypto';                                                                        
                                                                                                      
  export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {                                                      
    const { sessionName, role } = await req.json();                                                   
                                                                                                      
    const sdkKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_ZOOM_SDK_KEY || '';                                        
    const sdkSecret = process.env.ZOOM_SDK_SECRET || '';                                              
                                                                                                      
    if (!sdkKey || !sdkSecret ||                                                                      
        sdkSecret === 'your_zoom_sdk_secret_here') {                                                  
      return NextResponse.json({                                                                      
        signature: 'mock-signature',                                                                  
        isMock: true                                                                                  
      });                                                                                             
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const iat = Math.round(new Date().getTime() / 1000) - 30;                                         
    const exp = iat + 60 * 60 * 2;                                                                    
                                                                                                      
    const oHeader = { alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' };                                                     
    const oPayload = {                                                                                
      app_key: sdkKey,                                                                                
      tpc: sessionName,                                                                               
      role_type: role === 'host' ? 1 : 0,                                                             
      version: 1,                                                                                     
      iat,                                                                                            
      exp                                                                                             
    };                                                                                                
                                                                                                      
    const sHeader = btoa(JSON.stringify(oHeader));                                                    
    const sPayload = btoa(JSON.stringify(oPayload));                                                  
    const sSignatureInput = `${sHeader}.${sPayload}`;                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const signature = crypto                                                                          
      .createHmac('sha256', sdkSecret)                                                                
      .update(sSignatureInput)                                                                        
      .digest('base64');                                                                              
                                                                                                      
    return NextResponse.json({                                                                        
      signature: `${sSignatureInput}.${signature}`,                                                   
      isMock: false                                                                                   
    });                                                                                               
  }                                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  Also add ZOOM_SDK_SECRET (without NEXT_PUBLIC_) to .env.local:                                      
  ZOOM_SDK_SECRET=your_zoom_sdk_secret_here                                                           
                                                                                                      
  ---                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  STEP 3 — Create app/api/youtube-search/route.ts:                                                    
                                                                                                      
  Server-side YouTube search to avoid exposing API key:                                               
                                                                                                      
  import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';                                            
                                                                                                      
  export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {                                                       
    const query = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('q');                                                  
    const apiKey = process.env.YOUTUBE_API_KEY || '';                                                 
                                                                                                      
    if (!apiKey || apiKey === 'your_youtube_api_key_here') {                                          
      // Return mock results                                                                          
      return NextResponse.json({                                                                      
        items: [                                                                                      
          { id: 'L26jSx5TZns', title: '안동역에서 - 진성 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                
          { id: 'mock002', title: '사랑했나봐 - 이창원 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                  
          { id: 'mock003', title: '봄날 - BTS (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                           
          { id: 'mock004', title: '밤편지 - IU (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                          
          { id: 'mock005', title: '너를 위해 - 임재범 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                   
          { id: 'mock006', title: '사랑은 늘 도망가 - 임영웅 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },            
          { id: 'mock007', title: '미워도 다시 한번 - 남진 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },              
          { id: 'mock008', title: '칠갑산 - 주병선 (가라오케)', thumbnail: '' },                      
        ],                                                                                            
        isMock: true                                                                                  
      });                                                                                             
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const url =                                                                                       
  `https://www.googleapis.com/youtube/v3/search?part=snippet&q=${encodeURIComponent(query + '         
  가라오케')}&type=video&maxResults=8&key=${apiKey}`;                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const res = await fetch(url);                                                                     
    const data = await res.json();                                                                    
                                                                                                      
    const items = data.items?.map((item: any) => ({                                                   
      id: item.id.videoId,                                                                            
      title: item.snippet.title,                                                                      
      thumbnail: item.snippet.thumbnails?.default?.url || ''                                          
    })) || [];                                                                                        
                                                                                                      
    return NextResponse.json({ items, isMock: false });                                               
  }                                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  Also add to .env.local:                                                                             
  YOUTUBE_API_KEY=your_youtube_api_key_here                                                           
                                                                                                      
  ---                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  STEP 4 — Update song search in room to use API:                                                     
                                                                                                      
  Update the song search component in room-001/page.tsx:                                              
                                                                                                      
  const searchSongs = async (query: string) => {                                                      
    if (query.length < 2) {                                                                           
      setSearchResults([]);                                                                           
      return;                                                                                         
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    setIsSearching(true);                                                                             
    try {                                                                                             
      const res = await fetch(`/api/youtube-search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}`);                  
      const data = await res.json();                                                                  
      setSearchResults(data.items);                                                                   
      if (data.isMock) {                                                                              
        console.log('Using mock song data - add YouTube API key for real search');                    
      }                                                                                               
    } catch (err) {                                                                                   
      console.error('Search failed:', err);                                                           
    } finally {                                                                                       
      setIsSearching(false);                                                                          
    }                                                                                                 
  };                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  Use debounce (300ms) on search input change.

  STEP 5 — Create app/api/rooms/route.ts:                                                             
                                                                                                      
  Room management API:                                                                                
                                                                                                      
  GET /api/rooms?type=colosseum                                                                       
  - Returns list of active rooms                                                                      
  - Falls back to mock data if Supabase not configured                                                
                                                                                                      
  POST /api/rooms                                                                                     
  - Creates new room                                                                                  
  - Returns room ID                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';                                            
  import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';                                               
                                                                                                      
  const mockRooms = [                                                                                 
    {                                                                                                 
      id: 'room-001',                                                                                 
      title: '🎤 트로트 황금시대',                                                                    
      host_nickname: '노래왕김씨',                                                                    
      room_type: 'colosseum',                                                                         
      participant_count: 12,                                                                          
      max_participants: 50,                                                                           
      ticket_price: 0,                                                                                
      current_song: '안동역에서 - 진성',                                                              
      tags: ['#트로트', '#발라드'],                                                                   
      is_active: true,                                                                                
      is_live: true                                                                                   
    },                                                                                                
    {                                                                                                 
      id: 'room-002',                                                                                 
      title: '🎵 90년대 팝송 파티',                                                                   
      host_nickname: '팝스타유나',                                                                    
      room_type: 'colosseum',                                                                         
      participant_count: 8,                                                                           
      max_participants: 30,                                                                           
      ticket_price: 100,                                                                              
      current_song: 'My Heart Will Go On - Celine Dion',                                              
      tags: ['#팝', '#90년대'],                                                                       
      is_active: true,                                                                                
      is_live: true                                                                                   
    },                                                                                                
    {                                                                                                 
      id: 'room-003',                                                                                 
      title: '🔥 BTS 커버 배틀',                                                                      
      host_nickname: '방탄소년단팬',                                                                  
      room_type: 'colosseum',                                                                         
      participant_count: 24,                                                                          
      max_participants: 50,                                                                           
      ticket_price: 200,                                                                              
      current_song: '봄날 - BTS',                                                                     
      tags: ['#kpop', '#BTS'],                                                                        
      is_active: true,                                                                                
      is_live: true                                                                                   
    }                                                                                                 
  ];                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {                                                       
    const type = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('type') || 'colosseum';                                 
                                                                                                      
    const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL;                                         
    if (!supabaseUrl || supabaseUrl === 'your_supabase_url_here') {                                   
      return NextResponse.json({ rooms: mockRooms, isMock: true });                                   
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const supabase = createClient(                                                                    
      supabaseUrl,                                                                                    
      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!                                                      
    );                                                                                                
                                                                                                      
    const { data, error } = await supabase                                                            
      .from('rooms')                                                                                  
      .select('*')                                                                                    
      .eq('room_type', type)                                                                          
      .eq('is_active', true)                                                                          
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });                                                     
                                                                                                      
    if (error) {                                                                                      
      return NextResponse.json({ rooms: mockRooms, isMock: true });                                   
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    return NextResponse.json({ rooms: data, isMock: false });                                         
  }                                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {                                                      
    const body = await req.json();                                                                    
    const roomId = 'room-' + Date.now();                                                              
                                                                                                      
    const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL;                                         
    if (!supabaseUrl || supabaseUrl === 'your_supabase_url_here') {                                   
      return NextResponse.json({ roomId, isMock: true });                                             
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    const supabase = createClient(                                                                    
      supabaseUrl,                                                                                    
      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!                                                      
    );                                                                                                
                                                                                                      
    const { data, error } = await supabase                                                            
      .from('rooms')                                                                                  
      .insert({                                                                                       
        id: roomId,                                                                                   
        ...body                                                                                       
      })                                                                                              
      .select()                                                                                       
      .single();                                                                                      
                                                                                                      
    if (error) {                                                                                      
      return NextResponse.json({ roomId, isMock: true });                                             
    }                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
    return NextResponse.json({ roomId: data.id, isMock: false });                                     
  }

  STEP 6 — Create components/room/ConnectionStatus.tsx:                                               
                                                                                                      
  Show real-time connection status:                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  States:                                                                                             
  - connecting: 🟡 "연결 중..." (yellow pulse)                                                        
  - connected:  🟢 "연결됨" (green, auto-hides after 3s)                                              
  - degraded:   🟠 "연결 불안정" (orange, stays visible)                                              
  - disconnected: 🔴 "연결 끊김 - 재연결 중..." (red, with retry)                                     
  - mock:       🔵 "데모 모드" (blue, stays visible)                                                  
                                                                                                      
  Position: top-center of room, fixed                                                                 
  Style: small pill, glassmorphism, z-50                                                              
  Auto-hide when connected                                                                            
                                                                                                      
  Show "데모 모드" when:                                                                              
  - Supabase not configured OR                                                                        
  - Zoom SDK not configured

  STEP 7 — Environment check utility:                                                                 
  Create lib/utils/envCheck.ts:                                                                       
                                                                                                      
  export const envConfig = {                                                                          
    isSupabaseConfigured: () => {                                                                     
      const url = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL;                                               
      return !!(url && url !== 'your_supabase_url_here' && url.includes('supabase.co'));              
    },                                                                                                
    isZoomConfigured: () => {                                                                         
      const key = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_ZOOM_SDK_KEY;                                               
      return !!(key && key !== 'your_zoom_sdk_key_here');                                             
    },                                                                                                
    isYouTubeConfigured: () => {                                                                      
      const key = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_YOUTUBE_API_KEY;                                            
      return !!(key && key !== 'your_youtube_api_key_here');                                          
    },                                                                                                
    isDemoMode: () => {                                                                               
      return !envConfig.isSupabaseConfigured() || !envConfig.isZoomConfigured();                      
    }                                                                                                 
  };

      60 +// Song parsing helper: "제목 - 아티스트 (가라오케)" → { songTitle, artist }         
      61 +function parseSongTitle(raw: string): { songTitle: string; artist: string } {        
      62 +  const match = raw.match(/^(.+?)\s*[-–]\s*(.+?)(?:\s*\(.*?\))?\s*$/);               
      63 +  if (match) return { songTitle: match[1].trim(), artist: match[2].trim() };         
      64 +  return { songTitle: raw.replace(/\s*\(가라오케\)\s*$/i, "").trim(), artist: "" };

  [build]                                                                                             
    command = "npm run build"                                                                         
    publish = ".next"

    NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED = "1"                                                                     
    NODE_VERSION = "20"                                                                               
                                                                                                      
  [[plugins]]                                                                                         
    package = "@netlify/plugin-nextjs"

    for = "/*"                                                                                        
    [headers.values]                                                                                  
      X-Frame-Options = "SAMEORIGIN"                                                                  
      X-Content-Type-Options = "nosniff"                                                              
      Referrer-Policy = "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"                                             
      Permissions-Policy = "camera=*, microphone=*, display-capture=*"                                
                                                                                                      
  [[headers]]                                                                                         
    for = "/rooms/*"                                                                                  
    [headers.values]                                                                                  
      Permissions-Policy = "camera=*, microphone=*, display-capture=*"                                
                                                                                                      
  [dev]                                                                                               
    command = "npm run dev"                                                                           
    port = 3000

  STEP 2 — Update next.config.ts:                                                                     
                                                                                                      
  import type { NextConfig } from 'next';                                                             
                                                                                                      
  const nextConfig: NextConfig = {                                                                    
    reactStrictMode: true,                                                                            
    images: {                                                                                         
      domains: [                                                                                      
        'img.youtube.com',                                                                            
        'i.ytimg.com',                                                                                
        'blogger.googleusercontent.com',                                                              
        'lh3.googleusercontent.com'                                                                   
      ],                                                                                              
    },                                                                                                
    async headers() {                                                                                 
      return [                                                                                        
        {                                                                                             
          source: '/rooms/:path*',                                                                    
          headers: [                                                                                  
            {                                                                                         
              key: 'Permissions-Policy',                                                              
              value: 'camera=*, microphone=*, display-capture=*'                                      
            }                                                                                         
          ]                                                                                           
        }                                                                                             
      ];                                                                                              
    },                                                                                                
    webpack: (config) => {                                                                            
      config.resolve.fallback = {                                                                     
        ...config.resolve.fallback,                                                                   
        fs: false,                                                                                    
        net: false,                                                                                   
        tls: false,                                                                                   
      };                                                                                              
      return config;                                                                                  
    }                                                                                                 
  };

  STEP 4 — Create scripts/check-env.js:                                                               
                                                                                                      
  Script to verify environment before deploy:                                                         
                                                                                                      
  const required = [                                                                                  
    'NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL',                                                                       
    'NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY',                                                                  
    'NEXT_PUBLIC_ZOOM_SDK_KEY',                                                                       
    'ZOOM_SDK_SECRET',                                                                                
  ];                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  const optional = [                                                                                  
    'NEXT_PUBLIC_YOUTUBE_API_KEY',                                                                    
    'YOUTUBE_API_KEY',                                                                                
  ];                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  console.log('\n🔍 L\'Oxygène Environment Check\n');                                                 
                                                                                                      
  let hasError = false;                                                                               
                                                                                                      
  required.forEach(key => {                                                                           
    const val = process.env[key];                                                                     
    if (!val || val.includes('your_') || val.includes('your-')) {                                     
      console.log(`❌ MISSING: ${key}`);                                                              
      hasError = true;                                                                                
    } else {                                                                                          
      console.log(`✅ OK: ${key}`);                                                                   
    }                                                                                                 
  });                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  optional.forEach(key => {                                                                           
    const val = process.env[key];                                                                     
    if (!val || val.includes('your_')) {                                                              
      console.log(`⚠️   OPTIONAL (demo mode): ${key}`);                                                
    } else {                                                                                          
      console.log(`✅ OK: ${key}`);                                                                   
    }                                                                                                 
  });                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  if (hasError) {                                                                                     
    console.log('\n⚠️   Some required env vars missing — running in demo mode\n');                     
  } else {                                                                                            
    console.log('\n🚀 All environment variables configured!\n');                                      
  }                                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  Add to package.json scripts:                                                                        
  "check-env": "node scripts/check-env.js",

  builds.

⏺ Pushed. Here's what shipped:                                                                        
                                                                                                      
  ZoomVideoRoom.tsx                                                                                   
  - New "prejoin" state: on mount, initLocalMedia() runs first, then the pre-join screen appears      
  instead of immediately connecting                                                                   
  - Pre-join screen: mirrored live camera preview (or dark box with camera-slash when off), camera and
   mic toggle buttons (ON = cyan, OFF = red tint), "취소" → onLeave(), "입장하기" → connectToRoom()   
  - Camera/mic state set during pre-join flows directly into the room via LocalStreamContext          
  - "나중에 (카메라 없이 입장)" from the permission-denied modal now goes to pre-join instead of
  skipping straight to mock mode                                                                      
                                                                                                      
  BottomActionBar.tsx                                                                                 
  - Replaced useRoomStore mic/camera with useLocalStream() — buttons now control actual MediaStream   
  tracks                                                                                              
  - Camera OFF: red tint background + border + slash icon (matches mic OFF style)
                                                                                                      
  ParticipantRow.tsx                                        
  - Local participant thumbnail passes null stream when camera is off → shows avatar with a           
  semi-transparent camera-slash overlay                                                               
  - Muted badge uses !isMicActive from context (not the stale p.isMuted prop) for the local           
  participant

❯ Build the complete Revenue & Settlement Logic Architecture for L'Oxygène.                           
  This is the financial backbone of the platform.                                                     
                                                                                                      
  ---                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  STEP 1 — Update Supabase Schema (lib/supabase/schema.sql):                                          
                                                                                                      
  Add these tables to the existing schema:                                                            
                                                                                                      
  -- 유저 지갑 (User Wallets)                                                                         
  create table if not exists wallets (                                                                
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    user_id text unique not null,                                                                     
    nickname text not null,                                                                           
    balance integer default 0 not null,                                                               
    pending_balance integer default 0 not null,                                                       
    total_earned integer default 0 not null,                                                          
    total_spent integer default 0 not null,                                                           
    role text default 'user',                                                                         
    membership text default 'free',                                                                   
    trust_score integer default 50,                                                                   
    is_frozen boolean default false,                                                                  
    created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),                                                
    updated_at timestamp with time zone default now()                                                 
  );                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  -- 충전 주문 (Charge Orders)                                                                        
  create table if not exists charge_orders (                                                          
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    order_id text unique not null,                                                                    
    user_id text not null,                                                                            
    amount_krw integer not null,                                                                      
    amount_credits integer not null,                                                                  
    pg_provider text not null,                                                                        
    pg_transaction_id text,                                                                           
    status text default 'pending',                                                                    
    idempotency_key text unique not null,                                                             
    vat_amount integer default 0,                                                                     
    created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),                                                
    completed_at timestamp with time zone                                                             
  );                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  -- 트랜잭션 원장 (Transaction Ledger)                                                               
  create table if not exists transactions (                                                           
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    order_id text unique not null,                                                                    
    idempotency_key text unique not null,                                                             
    room_id text not null,                                                                            
    sender_id text not null,                                                                          
    receiver_id text not null,                                                                        
    director_id text,                                                                                 
    item_type text not null,                                                                          
    item_amount integer not null,                                                                     
    total_credits integer not null,                                                                   
    platform_cut integer not null,                                                                    
    director_cut integer not null,                                                                    
    host_cut integer not null,                                                                        
    status text default 'pending',                                                                    
    created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),                                                
    settled_at timestamp with time zone                                                               
  );                                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  -- 정산 요청 (Payout Requests)                                                                      
  create table if not exists payout_requests (                                                        
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    user_id text not null,                                                                            
    nickname text not null,                                                                           
    amount_credits integer not null,                                                                  
    amount_krw integer not null,                                                                      
    bank_name text,                                                                                   
    account_number text,                                                                              
    account_holder text,

  … +657 lines …                                                                                      
  SON.stringify({                                                                                     
            userId,                                                                                   
            amountKRW,                                                                                
            pgProvider,                                                                               
            idempotencyKey                                                                            
          })                                                                                          
        });                                                                                           
                                                                                                      
        const data = await res.json();                                                                
                                                                                                      
        if (data.success) {                                                                           
          setWallet(prev => ({                                                                        
            ...prev,                                                                                  
            balance: data.newBalance                                                                  
          }));                                                                                        
          return { success: true, creditsAdded: data.creditsAdded };                                  
        }                                                                                             
                                                                                                      
        return { success: false, error: data.error };                                                 
      } catch (err) {                                                                                 
        return { success: false, error: '충전 실패' };                                                
      }                                                                                               
    };                                                                                                
                                                                                                      
    return { wallet, sendGift, chargeCredits };                                                       
  }                                                                                                   
                                                                                                      
  function getItemPrice(itemType: string): number {                                                   
    const prices: Record<string, number> = {                                                          
      bouquet: 1000,                                                                                  
      bouquet_x5: 4500,                                                                               
      bouquet_x10: 8000,                                                                              
      champagne: 3000,                                                                                
      champagne_premium: 10000,                                                                       
      spotlight: 500,                                                                                 
    };                                                                                                
    return prices[itemType] || 1000;                                                                  
  }

  - 5,500 O₂ → ₩50,000 (+500 보너스 🎁)                                                               
  - 12,000 O₂ → ₩100,000 (+2,000 보너스 🎁)                                                           
  - 30,000 O₂ → ₩250,000 (+5,000 보너스 🎁)                                                           
  - 70,000 O₂ → ₩500,000 (+20,000 보너스 🎁)

  - 💳 신용카드                                                                                       
  - 📱 카카오페이                                                                                     
  - 📱 토스페이                                                                                       
  - 🏦 무통장입금                                                                                     
  - 💎 USDT (VVIP only, gold border)                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  VAT notice: "* 부가세 10% 포함 금액입니다"                                                          
                                                                                                      
  On package select → show payment method                                                             
  On payment confirm (mock) → call /api/payment/charge                                                
  On success → show "충전 완료!" with confetti animation                                              
  Update wallet balance in real-time

       85 +// ─── Small helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  
       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: 
          +string; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; trend?: "up" | "down" | "flat" })
          + {                                                                                  
       87 +  return (                                                                          
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(
          +255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>                  
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                           
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</s
          +pan>                                                                                
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={
          +{ background: `${color}15` }}>                                                      
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                
       93 +        </div>                                                                      
       94 +      </div>                                                                        
       95 +      <div>                                                                         
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>               
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                   
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                            
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 t
          +ext-green-400" />}                                                                  
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h
          +-3 text-red-400" />}                                                                
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS :
          + trend === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{sub}</span>                
      102 +          </div>                                                                    
      103 +        )}                                                                          
      104 +      </div>                                                                        
      105 +    </div>                                                                          
      106 +  );                                                                                
      107 +}                                                                                   
      108 +                                                                                    
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                  
      110 +  return (                                                                          
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ backgr
          +ound: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, color }}>                       
      112 +      {text}                                                                        
      113 +    </span>                                                                         
      114 +  );                                                                                
      115 +}                                                                                   
      116 +                                                                                    
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                              
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                   
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [W
          +ARN, "예정"],                                                                       
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"], 
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,2
          +55,255,0.3)", "기각"],                                                              
      122 +  };                                                                                
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];          
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                      
      125 +}                                                                                   
      126 +                                                                                    
      127 +// ─── Tab: Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

          + t) => s + t.amount, 0);

          +up-rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />                                       
      138 +        <KPICard label="현재 접속" value={String(totalLiveUsers)} sub={`${liveRooms.
          +length}개 방 활성`} icon="solar:pulse-2-bold" color={SUCCESS} trend="up" />         
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`
          +} sub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" color={WARN} trend="up" />      
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status =
          +== "pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="solar:shield-warning-bold" color={
          +DANGER} trend="flat" />
