      235 +                                                                                    
      236 +// ─── Tab: 유저관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      237 +function UsersTab() {                                                               
      238 +  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");                                         
      239 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      240 +  const [filterRole, setFilterRole] = useState("전체");                             
      241 +  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<User | null>(null);              
      242 +  const [users, setUsers] = useState(MOCK_USERS);                                   
      243 +                                                                                    
      244 +  const filtered = users.filter(u => {                                              
      245 +    const matchSearch = u.name.includes(search) || u.email.includes(search);        
      246 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || u.status === filterStatus;       
      247 +    const matchRole = filterRole === "전체" || u.role === filterRole;               
      248 +    return matchSearch && matchStatus && matchRole;                                 
      249 +  });                                                                               
      250 +                                                                                    
      251 +  const handleAction = (userId: string, action: "suspend" | "ban" | "restore") => { 
      252 +    setUsers(us => us.map(u => {                                                    
      253 +      if (u.id !== userId) return u;                                                
      254 +      return { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" 
          +? "suspended" : "banned" };                                                         
      255 +    }));                                                                            
      256 +    if (selectedUser?.id === userId) {                                              
      257 +      setSelectedUser(u => u ? { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : act
          +ion === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" } : null);                               
      258 +    }                                                                               
      259 +  };                                                                                
      260 +                                                                                    
      261 +  const memColor: Record<string, string> = { VVIP: "#FFD700", VIP: ACCENT, "일반": "
          +rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                           
      262 +  const roleColor: Record<string, string> = { admin: DANGER, host: ACCENT2, user: "r
          +gba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                            
      263 +                                                                                    
      264 +  return (                                                                          
      265 +    <div className="flex gap-4 h-full">                                             
      266 +      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-0">                          
      267 +        {/* Filters */}                                                             
      268 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                      
      269 +          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[180px]">                           
      270 +            <Icon icon="solar:magnifer-linear" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -t
          +ranslate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/30" />                                            
      271 +            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placehol
          +der="이름 또는 이메일 검색"                                                         
      272 +              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm text-white outli
          +ne-none"                                                                            
      273 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba
          +(255,255,255,0.1)", caretColor: ACCENT }} />                                        
      274 +          </div>                                                                    
      275 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                            
      276 +            {["전체", "active", "suspended", "banned"].map(s => (                   
      277 +              <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                    
      278 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all" 
      279 +                style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1p
          +x solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", bord
          +er: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>          
      280 +                {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "active" ? "정상" : s === "suspended"
          + ? "정지" : "차단"}                                                                 
      281 +              </button>                                                             
      282 +            ))}                                                                     
      283 +          </div>                                                                    
      284 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                            
      285 +            {["전체", "user", "host", "admin"].map(r => (                           
      286 +              <button key={r} onClick={() => setFilterRole(r)}                      
      287 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all" 
      288 +                style={filterRole === r ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px
          + solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", bor
          +der: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>         
      289 +                {r === "전체" ? "전체" : r === "user" ? "유저" : r === "host" ? "호 
          +스트" : "관리자"}                                                                   
      290 +              </button>                                                             
      291 +            ))}                                                                     
      292 +          </div>                                                                    
      293 +        </div>                                                                      
      294 +                                                                                    
      295 +        {/* Table */}                                                               
      296 +        <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex-1" style={{ background: "rg
          +ba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>               
      297 +          <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                         
      298 +            <table className="w-full text-xs">                                      
      299 +              <thead>                                                               
      300 +                <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      301 +                  {["이름", "이메일", "역할", "멤버십", "잔액", "방 수", "신고", "상
          +태", "가입일"].map(h => (                                                           
      302 +                    <th key={h} className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-me
          +dium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                                    
      303 +                  ))}                                                               
      304 +                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>     
      305 +                </tr>

      404 +// ─── Tab: 룸관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────   
      405 +function RoomsTab({ terminatedRooms, onForceEnd }: { terminatedRooms: Set<string>; o
          +nForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                
      406 +  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("전체");                             
      407 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      408 +                                                                                    
      409 +  const filtered = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => {                                         
      410 +    const matchType = filterType === "전체" || r.type === filterType;               
      411 +    const status = terminatedRooms.has(r.id) ? "ended" : r.status;                  
      412 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || status === filterStatus;         
      413 +    return matchType && matchStatus;                                                
      414 +  });                                                                               
      415 +                                                                                    
      416 +  return (

      422 +            <button key={t} onClick={() => setFilterType(t)}                        
      423 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"   
      424 +              style={filterType === t ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px so
          +lid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: 
          +"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>

          +der: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>

          + "예정" : "종료"}                                                                   
      435 +            </button>

      521 +// ─── Tab: 정산관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      522 +function SettlementsTab() {                                                         
      523 +  const [settled, setSettled] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                   
      524 +  const [confirmId, setConfirmId] = useState<string | null>(null);                  
      525 +                                                                                    
      526 +  const hosts = MOCK_USERS.filter(u => u.role === "host");                          
      527 +  const totalPending = hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).reduce((s, h) => s + Ma
          +th.floor(h.balance * 0.3), 0);                                                      
      528 +                                                                                    
      529 +  const doSettle = (id: string) => {                                                
      530 +    setSettled(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                           
      531 +    setConfirmId(null);                                                             
      532 +  };                                                                                
      533 +                                                                                    
      534 +  return (                                                                          
      535 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">

      538 +        <KPICard label="정산 대기" value={`₩${(totalPending * 10).toLocaleString()}`
          +} sub={`${hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).length}명`} icon="solar:clock-circle
          +-bold" color={WARN} />                                                              
      539 +        <KPICard label="이번 달 완료" value={`₩${(2_450_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub

      540 +        <KPICard label="플랫폼 수익 (50%)" value={`₩${(1_225_000).toLocaleString()}`

      541 +      </div>

      560 +          </button>

      604 +        </div>                                                                      
      605 +      </div>                                                                        
      606 +                                                                                    
      607 +      {/* Confirm modal */}                                                         
      608 +      {confirmId && (

          +yle={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(12px)" }}>             
      610 +          <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-5" style
          +={{ background: "rgba(4,10,18,0.98)", border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30` }}>          
      611 +            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">                               
      612 +              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center"
          + style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15` }}>                                            
      613 +                <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-5 h-5" style={{ co
          +lor: SUCCESS }} />                                                                  
      614 +              </div>                                                                
      615 +              <div>                                                                 
      616 +                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">정산 처리 확인</p>      
      617 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{hosts.find(h => h.id ==
          += confirmId)?.name}</p>                                                             
      618 +              </div>                                                                
      619 +            </div>                                                                  
      620 +            <p className="text-xs text-white/50 leading-relaxed">                   
      621 +              위 호스트에 대한 이번 달 정산을 처리합니다.                           
      622 +              정산 후 취소가 불가합니다. 계속하시겠습니까?                          
      623 +            </p>                                                                    
      624 +            <div className="flex gap-3">                                            
      625 +              <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(null)}                            
      626 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all
          +"                                                                                   
      627 +                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rg
          +ba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" }}>                            
      628 +                취소                                                                
      629 +              </button>                                                             
      630 +              <button onClick={() => doSettle(confirmId)}                           
      631 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all
          + active:scale-95"                                                                   
      632 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}50
          +`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                                               
      633 +                정산 처리                                                           
      634 +              </button>                                                             
      635 +            </div>                                                                  
      636 +          </div>

      638 +      )}

      642 +                                                                                    
      643 +// ─── Tab: 신고관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      644 +function ReportsTab() {                                                             
      645 +  const [reports, setReports] = useState(MOCK_REPORTS);                             
      646 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      647 +                                                                                    
      648 +  const filtered = filterStatus === "전체" ? reports : reports.filter(r => r.status 
          +=== filterStatus);                                                                  
      649 +                                                                                    
      650 +  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: "reviewed" | "dismissed") => {          
      651 +    setReports(rs => rs.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, status } : r));              
      652 +  };                                                                                
      653 +                                                                                    
      654 +  const catColor: Record<string, string> = { spam: WARN, abuse: DANGER, inappropriat
          +e: "#F97316", other: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                     
      655 +  const catLabel: Record<string, string> = { spam: "스팸", abuse: "괴롭힘", inapprop
          +riate: "부적절", other: "기타" };                                                   
      656 +                                                                                    
      657 +  return (                                                                          
      658 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                           
      659 +      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                
      660 +        {["전체", "pending", "reviewed", "dismissed"].map(s => (                    
      661 +          <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                        
      662 +            className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"     
      663 +            style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px so
          +lid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: 
          +"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>              
      664 +            {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "pending" ? "대기" : s === "reviewed" ? "
          +검토완료" : "기각"}                                                                 
      665 +          </button>                                                                 
      666 +        ))}                                                                         
      667 +      </div>                                                                        
      668 +                                                                                    
      669 +      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">                                         
      670 +        {filtered.map(r => (                                                        
      671 +          <div key={r.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"           
      672 +            style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${r.st
          +atus === "pending" ? `${DANGER}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}>                 
      673 +            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">      
      674 +              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">                                 
      675 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                           
      676 +                  <Badge text={catLabel[r.category]} color={catColor[r.category]} />
      677 +                  <StatusBadge status={r.status} />                                 
      678 +                  <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25">{r.at}</span>         
      679 +                </div>                                                              
      680 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{r.reason}</p>     
      681 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40">                               
      682 +                  <span className="text-white/60">{r.reporter}</span> → <span style=
          +{{ color: DANGER }}>{r.target}</span>                                               
      683 +                </p>                                                                
      684 +              </div>                                                                
      685 +              {r.status === "pending" && (                                          
      686 +                <div className="flex gap-2">                                        
      687 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "reviewed")}            
      688 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-a
          +ll hover:opacity-80"                                                                
      689 +                    style={{ background: `${ACCENT}12`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}
          +35`, color: ACCENT }}>                                                              
      690 +                    검토 완료                                                       
      691 +                  </button>                                                         
      692 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "dismissed")}           
      693 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-a
          +ll hover:opacity-80"                                                                
      694 +                    style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px soli
          +d rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                        
      695 +                    기각                                                            
      696 +                  </button>                                                         
      697 +                </div>                                                              
      698 +              )}                                                                    
      699 +            </div>                                                                  
      700 +          </div>                                                                    
      701 +        ))}                                                                         
      702 +        {filtered.length === 0 && (                                                 
      703 +          <div className="text-center py-12 text-white/20 text-sm">신고 내역이 없습 
          +니다</div>                                                                          
      704 +        )}                                                                          
      705 +      </div>                                                                        
      706 +    </div>                                                                          
      707 +  );                                                                                
      708 +}

      710 +// ─── Tab: 시스템설정 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      711 +function SystemSettingsTab() {

      715 +  const [maxRoomSize, setMaxRoomSize] = useState(500);                              
      716 +  const [maxRooms, setMaxRooms] = useState(50);                                     
      717 +  const [commissionRate, setCommissionRate] = useState(50);                         
      718 +                                                                                    
      719 +  const Toggle = ({ value, onChange }: { value: boolean; onChange: (v: boolean) => v
          +oid }) => (                                                                         
      720 +    <button onClick={() => onChange(!value)}

          +-all" style={{ left: value ? "calc(100% - 20px)" : "4px" }} />

          +ue: newUserReg, onChange: setNewUserReg, color: ACCENT },

          +: roomCreation, onChange: setRoomCreation, color: ACCENT },

      805 +// ─── Main Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  
      806  export default function AdminPage() {

      814 +    try {                                                                           
      815 +      const role = localStorage.getItem("loxygene-role");                           
      816 +      // In dev/mock mode, allow if no role is set OR role is "admin"               
      817 +      if (role !== null && role !== "admin") {                                      
      818 +        router.replace("/");                                                        
      819 +      }                                                                             
      820 +    } catch {                                                                       
      821 +      // localStorage unavailable (SSR or privacy mode) — allow through             
      822 +    }                                                                               
      823 +  }, [router]);                                                                     
      824 +                                                                                    
      825 +  const handleForceEnd = (id: string) => {                                          
      826 +    setTerminatedRooms(s => new Set([...s, id]));

      914        </div>
      915 +                                                                                    
      916 +      <style>{`                                                                     
      917 +        @keyframes pulse-neon { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:0.4} }

          +ransform:translateY(0)} }                                                           
      919 +      `}</style>                                                                    
      920      </div>
      921    );
      922  }

❯ Build a complete authentication system for the L'Oxygène (Loxygène) Next.js project.                
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STACK                                                                                               
  ==============================================                                                      
  - NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) for session management                                                   
  - Supabase for database (users table)                                                               
  - bcryptjs for password hashing                                                                     
  - Zod for form validation                                                                           
  - All UI in Korean                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  Install dependencies first:                                                                         
  npm install next-auth@beta @auth/supabase-adapter supabase bcryptjs zod                             
  npm install -D @types/bcryptjs                                                                      
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 1 — Supabase Setup                                                                             
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Create lib/supabase.ts:                                                                             
  - Supabase client using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY         
                                                                                                      
  Create the users table SQL (save as supabase/schema.sql):                                           
  ```sql                                                                                              
  create table users (                                                                                
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    email text unique not null,                                                                       
    nickname text not null,                                                                           
    password_hash text,                                                                               
    provider text default 'email',                                                                    
    provider_id text,                                                                                 
    avatar_url text,                                                                                  
    role text default 'user',                                                                         
    coins integer default 0,                                                                          
    created_at timestamptz default now(),                                                             
    updated_at timestamptz default now()                                                              
  );                                                                                                  
  ```                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 2 — NextAuth Configuration                                                                     
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Create auth.ts at project root:                                                                     
  - Credentials provider (email + password)                                                           
  - Google OAuth provider (env: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET)                               
  - Kakao OAuth provider (env: KAKAO_CLIENT_ID, KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET)                                  
  - JWT strategy                                                                                      
  - Session includes: id, nickname, role, coins, avatar_url                                           
  - callbacks: jwt (add custom fields), session (expose to client)                                    
                                                                                                      
  Create app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts                                                          
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 3 — Auth Pages                                                                                 
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/login/page.tsx ---                                                                     
  Design:                                                                                             
  - Full screen dark bg with subtle cyan/pink radial glow (same vibe as other pages)                  
  - Centered glass card (backdrop-blur, border border-white/10)                                       
  - L'Oxygène logo + tagline at top                                                                   
  - Email input + Password input (toggle visibility button)                                           
  - "로그인" button (full width, cyan glow)                                                           
  - Divider "또는"                                                                                    
  - Social login buttons:                                                                             
    - 구글로 계속하기 (white bg, Google icon)                                                         
    - 카카오로 계속하기 (kakao yellow #FEE500, kakao logo)                                            
  - "비밀번호 찾기" link → /auth/forgot-password                                                      
  - "계정이 없으신가요? 회원가입" link → /auth/register                                               
  - Error display: red toast/inline message for wrong credentials                                     
  - On success: redirect to / (or the page they came from using callbackUrl)                          
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/register/page.tsx ---                                                                  
  Multi-step form (3 steps with progress bar):                                                        
                                                                                                      
  Step 1 — 기본 정보:                                                                                 
  - Email input (real-time format validation)                                                         
  - Password input (strength indicator bar: 약함/보통/강함/매우강함)                                  
  - Password confirm input                                                                            
  - "다음" button                                                                                     
                                                                                                      
  Step 2 — 프로필 설정:                                                                               
  - Nickname input (2–16자, Korean/English/numbers only, real-time availability check mock)           
  - Avatar selector: 6 preset avatar options (colored circle with emoji, selectable)                  
  - "다음" button                                                                                     
                                                                                                      
  Step 3 — 약관 동의:                                                                                 
  - 전체 동의 checkbox (checks all below)                                                             
  - [필수] 서비스 이용약관 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                    
  - [필수] 개인정보 처리방침 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                  
  - [선택] 마케팅 정보 수신 동의                                                                      
  - "가입 완료" button (disabled until required boxes checked)                                        
  - On submit: POST to /api/auth/register → success modal → redirect to /auth/login                   
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/forgot-password/page.tsx ---                                                           
  - Email input                                                                                       
  - "재설정 메일 발송" button                                                                         
  - Mock success state: "이메일을 확인해주세요" with envelope animation                               
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 4 — API Routes                                                                                 
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  app/api/auth/register/route.ts (POST):                                                              
  - Validate with Zod (email, password min 8 chars, nickname)                                         
  - Check if email already exists in Supabase                                                         
  - Hash password with bcryptjs (saltRounds: 12)                                                      
  - Insert new user into Supabase users table                                                         
  - Return success or error JSON                                                                      
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 5 — Auth Guard & Session Integration                                                           
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Update middleware.ts:                                                                               
  - Protected routes: /payments/*, /admin/* (admin role only), /rooms/*/[roomId]/*                    
  - If not authenticated → redirect to /auth/login?callbackUrl=<current_path>                         
  - If authenticated but not admin → redirect to / for /admin/* routes                                
                                                                                                      
  Update app/layout.tsx:                                                                              
  - Wrap with SessionProvider                                                                         
  - Header: show user avatar + nickname + coin balance if logged in, else "로그인" button             
                                                                                                      
  Update Header component (components/Header.tsx or wherever it lives):                               
  - If logged in: avatar (circle, 32px), nickname, coin balance with 🪙 icon, dropdown menu:          
    - 마이페이지                                                                                      
    - 코인 충전 → /payments/charge                                                                    
    - 설정 → /control-panel                                                                           
    - 로그아웃                                                                                        
  - If not logged in: "로그인" button (cyan outline) + "회원가입" button (cyan filled)                
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 6 — .env.local Template

  Create .env.local.example with all required variables:

       85 +// ─── Small helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────  
       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: 
          +string; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; trend?: "up" | "down" | "flat" })
          + {                                                                                  
       87 +  return (                                                                          
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(
          +255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>                  
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                           
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</s
          +pan>                                                                                
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={
          +{ background: `${color}15` }}>                                                      
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                
       93 +        </div>                                                                      
       94 +      </div>                                                                        
       95 +      <div>                                                                         
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>               
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                   
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                            
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 t
          +ext-green-400" />}                                                                  
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h
          +-3 text-red-400" />}                                                                
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS :
          + trend === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{sub}</span>                
      102 +          </div>                                                                    
      103 +        )}                                                                          
      104 +      </div>                                                                        
      105 +    </div>                                                                          
      106 +  );                                                                                
      107 +}                                                                                   
      108 +                                                                                    
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                  
      110 +  return (                                                                          
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ backgr
          +ound: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, color }}>                       
      112 +      {text}                                                                        
      113 +    </span>                                                                         
      114 +  );                                                                                
      115 +}                                                                                   
      116 +                                                                                    
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                              
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                   
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [W
          +ARN, "예정"],                                                                       
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"], 
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,2
          +55,255,0.3)", "기각"],                                                              
      122 +  };                                                                                
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];          
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                      
      125 +}                                                                                   
      126 +                                                                                    
      127 +// ─── Tab: Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

          + t) => s + t.amount, 0);                                                            
      132 +

          +up-rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />                                       
      138 +        <KPICard label="현재 접속" value={String(totalLiveUsers)} sub={`${liveRooms.
          +length}개 방 활성`} icon="solar:pulse-2-bold" color={SUCCESS} trend="up" />         
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`
          +} sub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" color={WARN} trend="up" />      
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status =
          +== "pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="solar:shield-warning-bold" color={
          +DANGER} trend="flat" />

          +}</p>

      235 +                                                                                    
      236 +// ─── Tab: 유저관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      237 +function UsersTab() {                                                               
      238 +  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");                                         
      239 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      240 +  const [filterRole, setFilterRole] = useState("전체");                             
      241 +  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<User | null>(null);              
      242 +  const [users, setUsers] = useState(MOCK_USERS);                                   
      243 +                                                                                    
      244 +  const filtered = users.filter(u => {                                              
      245 +    const matchSearch = u.name.includes(search) || u.email.includes(search);        
      246 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || u.status === filterStatus;       
      247 +    const matchRole = filterRole === "전체" || u.role === filterRole;               
      248 +    return matchSearch && matchStatus && matchRole;                                 
      249 +  });                                                                               
      250 +                                                                                    
      251 +  const handleAction = (userId: string, action: "suspend" | "ban" | "restore") => { 
      252 +    setUsers(us => us.map(u => {                                                    
      253 +      if (u.id !== userId) return u;                                                
      254 +      return { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" 
          +? "suspended" : "banned" };                                                         
      255 +    }));                                                                            
      256 +    if (selectedUser?.id === userId) {                                              
      257 +      setSelectedUser(u => u ? { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : act
          +ion === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" } : null);                               
      258 +    }                                                                               
      259 +  };                                                                                
      260 +                                                                                    
      261 +  const memColor: Record<string, string> = { VVIP: "#FFD700", VIP: ACCENT, "일반": "
          +rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                           
      262 +  const roleColor: Record<string, string> = { admin: DANGER, host: ACCENT2, user: "r
          +gba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                            
      263 +                                                                                    
      264 +  return (                                                                          
      265 +    <div className="flex gap-4 h-full">                                             
      266 +      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-0">                          
      267 +        {/* Filters */}                                                             
      268 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                      
      269 +          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[180px]">                           
      270 +            <Icon icon="solar:magnifer-linear" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -t
          +ranslate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/30" />                                            
      271 +            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placehol
          +der="이름 또는 이메일 검색"                                                         
      272 +              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm text-white outli
          +ne-none"                                                                            
      273 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba
          +(255,255,255,0.1)", caretColor: ACCENT }} />                                        
      274 +          </div>                                                                    
      275 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                            
      276 +            {["전체", "active", "suspended", "banned"].map(s => (                   
      277 +              <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                    
      278 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all" 
      279 +                style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1p
          +x solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", bord
          +er: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>          
      280 +                {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "active" ? "정상" : s === "suspended"
          + ? "정지" : "차단"}                                                                 
      281 +              </button>                                                             
      282 +            ))}                                                                     
      283 +          </div>                                                                    
      284 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                            
      285 +            {["전체", "user", "host", "admin"].map(r => (                           
      286 +              <button key={r} onClick={() => setFilterRole(r)}                      
      287 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all" 
      288 +                style={filterRole === r ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px
          + solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", bor
          +der: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>         
      289 +                {r === "전체" ? "전체" : r === "user" ? "유저" : r === "host" ? "호 
          +스트" : "관리자"}                                                                   
      290 +              </button>                                                             
      291 +            ))}                                                                     
      292 +          </div>                                                                    
      293 +        </div>                                                                      
      294 +                                                                                    
      295 +        {/* Table */}                                                               
      296 +        <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex-1" style={{ background: "rg
          +ba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>               
      297 +          <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                         
      298 +            <table className="w-full text-xs">                                      
      299 +              <thead>                                                               
      300 +                <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>

      404 +// ─── Tab: 룸관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────   
      405 +function RoomsTab({ terminatedRooms, onForceEnd }: { terminatedRooms: Set<string>; o
          +nForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                
      406 +  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("전체");                             
      407 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      408 +

      410 +    const matchType = filterType === "전체" || r.type === filterType;               
      411 +    const status = terminatedRooms.has(r.id) ? "ended" : r.status;                  
      412 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || status === filterStatus;         
      413 +    return matchType && matchStatus;                                                
      414 +  });                                                                               
      415 +                                                                                    
      416 +  return (

          +lid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border:

      521 +// ─── Tab: 정산관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      522 +function SettlementsTab() {                                                         
      523 +  const [settled, setSettled] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                   
      524 +  const [confirmId, setConfirmId] = useState<string | null>(null);                  
      525 +                                                                                    
      526 +  const hosts = MOCK_USERS.filter(u => u.role === "host");                          
      527 +  const totalPending = hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).reduce((s, h) => s + Ma
          +th.floor(h.balance * 0.3), 0);                                                      
      528 +                                                                                    
      529 +  const doSettle = (id: string) => {                                                
      530 +    setSettled(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                           
      531 +    setConfirmId(null);                                                             
      532 +  };                                                                                
      533 +                                                                                    
      534 +  return (                                                                          
      535 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                           
      536 +      {/* Summary */}                                                               
      537 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                       
      538 +        <KPICard label="정산 대기" value={`₩${(totalPending * 10).toLocaleString()}`
          +} sub={`${hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).length}명`} icon="solar:clock-circle
          +-bold" color={WARN} />                                                              
      539 +        <KPICard label="이번 달 완료" value={`₩${(2_450_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub
          +="18건 처리" icon="solar:check-circle-bold" color={SUCCESS} />                      
      540 +        <KPICard label="플랫폼 수익 (50%)" value={`₩${(1_225_000).toLocaleString()}`
          +} sub="이번 달" icon="solar:graph-up-bold" color={ACCENT} />                        
      541 +      </div>                                                                        
      542 +

      544 +      <div className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex gap-3 items-start" style={{ background: `
          +${ACCENT}08`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}20` }}>                                   
      545 +        <Icon icon="solar:info-circle-bold" className="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0"

      547 +          <span className="font-bold text-white/70">수익 분배 구조: </span>

          +olor: SUCCESS }}>

      560 +          </button>

      563 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">

      566 +                {["호스트", "멤버십", "총 수익", "호스트 몫 (30%)", "정산 상태"].map

      601 +              })}                                                                   
      602 +            </tbody>                                                                
      603 +          </table>                                                                  
      604 +        </div>                                                                      
      605 +      </div>                                                                        
      606 +                                                                                    
      607 +      {/* Confirm modal */}                                                         
      608 +      {confirmId && (                                                               
      609 +        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center px-4" st
          +yle={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(12px)" }}>             
      610 +          <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-5" style
          +={{ background: "rgba(4,10,18,0.98)", border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30` }}>          
      611 +            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">                               
      612 +              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center"
          + style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15` }}>                                            
      613 +                <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-5 h-5" style={{ co
          +lor: SUCCESS }} />                                                                  
      614 +              </div>                                                                
      615 +              <div>                                                                 
      616 +                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">정산 처리 확인</p>      
      617 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{hosts.find(h => h.id ==
          += confirmId)?.name}</p>                                                             
      618 +              </div>                                                                
      619 +            </div>                                                                  
      620 +            <p className="text-xs text-white/50 leading-relaxed">                   
      621 +              위 호스트에 대한 이번 달 정산을 처리합니다.                           
      622 +              정산 후 취소가 불가합니다. 계속하시겠습니까?                          
      623 +            </p>                                                                    
      624 +            <div className="flex gap-3">                                            
      625 +              <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(null)}                            
      626 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all
          +"                                                                                   
      627 +                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rg
          +ba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" }}>                            
      628 +                취소                                                                
      629 +              </button>                                                             
      630 +              <button onClick={() => doSettle(confirmId)}                           
      631 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all
          + active:scale-95"                                                                   
      632 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}50
          +`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                                               
      633 +                정산 처리                                                           
      634 +              </button>                                                             
      635 +            </div>                                                                  
      636 +          </div>                                                                    
      637 +        </div>                                                                      
      638 +      )}                                                                            
      639 +    </div>                                                                          
      640 +  );                                                                                
      641 +}                                                                                   
      642 +                                                                                    
      643 +// ─── Tab: 신고관리 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 
      644 +function ReportsTab() {                                                             
      645 +  const [reports, setReports] = useState(MOCK_REPORTS);                             
      646 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                         
      647 +                                                                                    
      648 +  const filtered = filterStatus === "전체" ? reports : reports.filter(r => r.status 
          +=== filterStatus);                                                                  
      649 +                                                                                    
      650 +  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: "reviewed" | "dismissed") => {          
      651 +    setReports(rs => rs.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, status } : r));              
      652 +  };                                                                                
      653 +                                                                                    
      654 +  const catColor: Record<string, string> = { spam: WARN, abuse: DANGER, inappropriat
          +e: "#F97316", other: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                     
      655 +  const catLabel: Record<string, string> = { spam: "스팸", abuse: "괴롭힘", inapprop
          +riate: "부적절", other: "기타" };                                                   
      656 +                                                                                    
      657 +  return (                                                                          
      658 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                           
      659 +      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                
      660 +        {["전체", "pending", "reviewed", "dismissed"].map(s => (                    
      661 +          <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                        
      662 +            className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"     
      663 +            style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px so
          +lid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: 
          +"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>              
      664 +            {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "pending" ? "대기" : s === "reviewed" ? "
          +검토완료" : "기각"}                                                                 
      665 +          </button>                                                                 
      666 +        ))}                                                                         
      667 +      </div>                                                                        
      668 +                                                                                    
      669 +      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">                                         
      670 +        {filtered.map(r => (                                                        
      671 +          <div key={r.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"           
      672 +            style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${r.st
          +atus === "pending" ? `${DANGER}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}>                 
      673 +            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">      
      674 +              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">                                 
      675 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                           
      676 +                  <Badge text={catLabel[r.category]} color={catColor[r.category]} />
      677 +                  <StatusBadge status={r.status} />                                 
      678 +                  <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25">{r.at}</span>         
      679 +                </div>                                                              
      680 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{r.reason}</p>     
      681 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40">                               
      682 +                  <span className="text-white/60">{r.reporter}</span> → <span style=
          +{{ color: DANGER }}>{r.target}</span>                                               
      683 +                </p>                                                                
      684 +              </div>                                                                
      685 +              {r.status === "pending" && (                                          
      686 +                <div className="flex gap-2">                                        
      687 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "reviewed")}            
      688 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-a
          +ll hover:opacity-80"                                                                
      689 +                    style={{ background: `${ACCENT}12`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}
          +35`, color: ACCENT }}>                                                              
      690 +                    검토 완료                                                       
      691 +                  </button>                                                         
      692 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "dismissed")}           
      693 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-a
          +ll hover:opacity-80"                                                                
      694 +                    style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px soli
          +d rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                        
      695 +                    기각                                                            
      696 +                  </button>                                                         
      697 +                </div>                                                              
      698 +              )}                                                                    
      699 +            </div>                                                                  
      700 +          </div>                                                                    
      701 +        ))}                                                                         
      702 +        {filtered.length === 0 && (                                                 
      703 +          <div className="text-center py-12 text-white/20 text-sm">신고 내역이 없습 
          +니다</div>                                                                          
      704 +        )}                                                                          
      705 +      </div>                                                                        
      706 +    </div>                                                                          
      707 +  );                                                                                
      708 +}

      710 +// ─── Tab: 시스템설정 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

          +oid }) => (

      816 +      // In dev/mock mode, allow if no role is set OR role is "admin"

      818 +        router.replace("/");                                                        
      819 +      }                                                                             
      820 +    } catch {                                                                       
      821 +      // localStorage unavailable (SSR or privacy mode) — allow through

      824 +
