❯ Build a complete authentication system for the L'Oxygène (Loxygène) Next.js project.                
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STACK                                                                                               
  ==============================================                                                      
  - NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) for session management                                                   
  - Supabase for database (users table)                                                               
  - bcryptjs for password hashing                                                                     
  - Zod for form validation                                                                           
  - All UI in Korean                                                                                  
                                                                                                      
  Install dependencies first:                                                                         
  npm install next-auth@beta @auth/supabase-adapter supabase bcryptjs zod                             
  npm install -D @types/bcryptjs                                                                      
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 1 — Supabase Setup                                                                             
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Create lib/supabase.ts:                                                                             
  - Supabase client using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY         
                                                                                                      
  Create the users table SQL (save as supabase/schema.sql):                                           
  ```sql                                                                                              
  create table users (                                                                                
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                    
    email text unique not null,                                                                       
    nickname text not null,                                                                           
    password_hash text,                                                                               
    provider text default 'email',                                                                    
    provider_id text,                                                                                 
    avatar_url text,                                                                                  
    role text default 'user',                                                                         
    coins integer default 0,                                                                          
    created_at timestamptz default now(),                                                             
    updated_at timestamptz default now()                                                              
  );                                                                                                  
  ```                                                                                                 
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 2 — NextAuth Configuration                                                                     
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Create auth.ts at project root:                                                                     
  - Credentials provider (email + password)                                                           
  - Google OAuth provider (env: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET)                               
  - Kakao OAuth provider (env: KAKAO_CLIENT_ID, KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET)                                  
  - JWT strategy                                                                                      
  - Session includes: id, nickname, role, coins, avatar_url                                           
  - callbacks: jwt (add custom fields), session (expose to client)                                    
                                                                                                      
  Create app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts                                                          
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 3 — Auth Pages                                                                                 
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/login/page.tsx ---                                                                     
  Design:                                                                                             
  - Full screen dark bg with subtle cyan/pink radial glow (same vibe as other pages)                  
  - Centered glass card (backdrop-blur, border border-white/10)                                       
  - L'Oxygène logo + tagline at top                                                                   
  - Email input + Password input (toggle visibility button)                                           
  - "로그인" button (full width, cyan glow)                                                           
  - Divider "또는"                                                                                    
  - Social login buttons:                                                                             
    - 구글로 계속하기 (white bg, Google icon)                                                         
    - 카카오로 계속하기 (kakao yellow #FEE500, kakao logo)                                            
  - "비밀번호 찾기" link → /auth/forgot-password                                                      
  - "계정이 없으신가요? 회원가입" link → /auth/register                                               
  - Error display: red toast/inline message for wrong credentials                                     
  - On success: redirect to / (or the page they came from using callbackUrl)                          
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/register/page.tsx ---                                                                  
  Multi-step form (3 steps with progress bar):                                                        
                                                                                                      
  Step 1 — 기본 정보:                                                                                 
  - Email input (real-time format validation)                                                         
  - Password input (strength indicator bar: 약함/보통/강함/매우강함)                                  
  - Password confirm input                                                                            
  - "다음" button                                                                                     
                                                                                                      
  Step 2 — 프로필 설정:                                                                               
  - Nickname input (2–16자, Korean/English/numbers only, real-time availability check mock)           
  - Avatar selector: 6 preset avatar options (colored circle with emoji, selectable)                  
  - "다음" button                                                                                     
                                                                                                      
  Step 3 — 약관 동의:                                                                                 
  - 전체 동의 checkbox (checks all below)                                                             
  - [필수] 서비스 이용약관 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                    
  - [필수] 개인정보 처리방침 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                  
  - [선택] 마케팅 정보 수신 동의                                                                      
  - "가입 완료" button (disabled until required boxes checked)                                        
  - On submit: POST to /api/auth/register → success modal → redirect to /auth/login                   
                                                                                                      
  --- app/auth/forgot-password/page.tsx ---                                                           
  - Email input                                                                                       
  - "재설정 메일 발송" button                                                                         
  - Mock success state: "이메일을 확인해주세요" with envelope animation                               
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 4 — API Routes                                                                                 
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  app/api/auth/register/route.ts (POST):                                                              
  - Validate with Zod (email, password min 8 chars, nickname)                                         
  - Check if email already exists in Supabase                                                         
  - Hash password with bcryptjs (saltRounds: 12)                                                      
  - Insert new user into Supabase users table                                                         
  - Return success or error JSON                                                                      
                                                                                                      
  ==============================================                                                      
  STEP 5 — Auth Guard & Session Integration                                                           
  ==============================================                                                      
                                                                                                      
  Update middleware.ts:                                                                               
  - Protected routes: /payments/*, /admin/* (admin role only), /rooms/*/[roomId]/*                    
  - If not authenticated → redirect to /auth/login?callbackUrl=<current_path>                         
  - If authenticated but not admin → redirect to / for /admin/* routes                                
                                                                                                      
  Update app/layout.tsx:                                                                              
  - Wrap with SessionProvider                                                                         
  - Header: show user avatar + nickname + coin balance if logged in, else "로그인" button             
                                                                                                      
  Update Header component (components/Header.tsx or wherever it lives):

    - 마이페이지                                                                                      
    - 코인 충전 → /payments/charge                                                                    
    - 설정 → /control-panel                                                                           
    - 로그아웃                                                                                        
  - If not logged in: "로그인" button (cyan outline) + "회원가입" button (cyan filled)

       29 +}

       31 +  id: string; reporter: string; target: string; reason: string;                        
       32 +  category: "spam" | "abuse" | "inappropriate" | "other"; at: string;                  
       33 +  status: "pending" | "reviewed" | "dismissed";

       85 +// ─── Small helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────     
       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: str
          +ing; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; trend?: "up" | "down" | "flat" }) {    
       87 +  return (                                                                             
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(255
          +,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>                        
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                              
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</span
          +>                                                                                      
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ b
          +ackground: `${color}15` }}>                                                            
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                   
       93 +        </div>                                                                         
       94 +      </div>                                                                           
       95 +      <div>                                                                            
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>                  
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                      
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                               
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text
          +-green-400" />}                                                                        
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h-3 
          +text-red-400" />}                                                                      
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS : tr
          +end === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{sub}</span>                      
      102 +          </div>                                                                       
      103 +        )}                                                                             
      104 +      </div>                                                                           
      105 +    </div>                                                                             
      106 +  );                                                                                   
      107 +}                                                                                      
      108 +                                                                                       
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                     
      110 +  return (                                                                             
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ backgroun
          +d: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, color }}>                             
      112 +      {text}                                                                           
      113 +    </span>                                                                            
      114 +  );                                                                                   
      115 +}                                                                                      
      116 +                                                                                       
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                                 
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                      
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [WARN
          +, "예정"],                                                                             
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"],    
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,255,
          +255,0.3)", "기각"],                                                                    
      122 +  };                                                                                   
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];             
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                         
      125 +}                                                                                      
      126 +                                                                                       
      127 +// ─── Tab: Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────     
      128 +function DashboardTab({ onForceEnd }: { onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {          
      129 +  const liveRooms = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => r.status === "live");                       
      130 +  const totalLiveUsers = liveRooms.reduce((s, r) => s + r.participants, 0);            
      131 +  const todayRevenue = MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.filter(t => t.type === "charge").reduce((s, t)
          + => s + t.amount, 0);                                                                  
      132 +                                                                                       
      133 +  return (                                                                             
      134 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                              
      135 +      {/* KPIs */}                                                                     
      136 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">                          
      137 +        <KPICard label="총 유저" value="8,421" sub="+127 오늘" icon="solar:users-group-
          +rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />                                             
      138 +        <KPICard label="현재 접속" value={String(totalLiveUsers)} sub={`${liveRooms.len
          +gth}개 방 활성`} icon="solar:pulse-2-bold" color={SUCCESS} trend="up" />               
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`} s
          +ub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" color={WARN} trend="up" />            
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status === 
          +"pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="solar:shield-warning-bold" color={DANGER
          +} trend="flat" />                                                                      
      141 +      </div>                                                                           
      142 +                                                                                       
      143 +      {/* Active rooms table */}                                                       
      144 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,2
          +55,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>

          +{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                            
      146 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">활성 룸</p>                      
      147 +          <span className="text-xs text-white/30">{liveRooms.length}개 라이브</span>   
      148 +        </div>

          +whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                                            
      155 +                ))}                                                                    
      156 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>          
      157 +              </tr>                                                                    
      158 +            </thead>                                                                   
      159 +            <tbody>                                                                    
      160 +              {liveRooms.map(room => (                                                 
      161 +                <tr key={room.id} className="border-t transition-colors hover:bg-white/
          +[0.02]" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                             
      162 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/80 font-medium max-w-[160px] trun
          +cate">{room.title}</td>

          +td>

          +]">

          +articipants / room.maxParticipants) * 100}%`, background: ACCENT }} />                 
      169 +                      </div>                                                           
      170 +                      <span className="text-white/50 whitespace-nowrap">{room.participa
          +nts}/{room.maxParticipants}</span>                                                     
      171 +                    </div>                                                             
      172 +                  </td>

          +evenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                                    
      174 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3">                                           
      175 +                    <button onClick={() => onForceEnd(room.id)}

          +all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"

          +0`, color: DANGER }}>                                                                  
      178 +                      강제종료

          +55,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>

          +.06)" }}>

      194 +          {MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.map(tx => {                                               
      195 +            const typeColor = tx.type === "charge" ? SUCCESS : tx.type === "earn" ? ACC
          +ENT : tx.type === "settle" ? WARN : DANGER;                                            
      196 +            const typeLabel = tx.type === "charge" ? "충전" : tx.type === "earn" ? "수 
          +익" : tx.type === "settle" ? "정산" : "지출";                                          
      197 +            return (

          +ite/[0.02] transition-colors"

      200 +                <Badge text={typeLabel} color={typeColor} />                           
      201 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                       
      202 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/70 truncate">{tx.user} — {tx.desc}</
          +p>                                                                                     
      203 +                </div>                                                                 
      204 +                <span className="text-xs font-bold tabular-nums whitespace-nowrap" styl
          +e={{ color: tx.amount > 0 ? SUCCESS : "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                      
      205 +                  {tx.amount > 0 ? "+" : ""}₩{(tx.amount * 10).toLocaleString()}       
      206 +                </span>                                                                
      207 +                <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25 whitespace-nowrap">{tx.at}</
          +span>                                                                                  
      208 +              </div>                                                                   
      209 +            );                                                                         
      210 +          })}                                                                          
      211 +        </div>                                                                         
      212 +      </div>

      214 +      {/* Quick Actions */}                                                            
      215 +      <div>

          +>

      218 +          {[                                                                           
      219 +            { label: "공지 발송", icon: "solar:megaphone-bold", color: ACCENT },       
      220 +            { label: "전체 정지", icon: "solar:pause-circle-bold", color: WARN },      
      221 +            { label: "DB 백업", icon: "solar:database-bold", color: ACCENT2 },         
      222 +            { label: "캐시 초기화", icon: "solar:refresh-bold", color: "rgba(255,255,25
          +5,0.4)" },                                                                             
      223 +          ].map(a => (                                                                 
      224 +            <button key={a.label} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounde
          +d-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"              
      225 +              style={{ background: `${a.color}10`, border: `1px solid ${a.color}30`, co
          +lor: a.color }}>

      229 +          ))}

      231 +      </div>                                                                           
      232 +    </div>                                                                             
      233 +  );                                                                                   
      234 +}                                                                                      
      235 +                                                                                       
      236 +// ─── Tab: 유저관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    
      237 +function UsersTab() {                                                                  
      238 +  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");                                            
      239 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                            
      240 +  const [filterRole, setFilterRole] = useState("전체");                                
      241 +  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<User | null>(null);                 
      242 +  const [users, setUsers] = useState(MOCK_USERS);                                      
      243 +                                                                                       
      244 +  const filtered = users.filter(u => {                                                 
      245 +    const matchSearch = u.name.includes(search) || u.email.includes(search);           
      246 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || u.status === filterStatus;          
      247 +    const matchRole = filterRole === "전체" || u.role === filterRole;                  
      248 +    return matchSearch && matchStatus && matchRole;                                    
      249 +  });                                                                                  
      250 +                                                                                       
      251 +  const handleAction = (userId: string, action: "suspend" | "ban" | "restore") => {    
      252 +    setUsers(us => us.map(u => {                                                       
      253 +      if (u.id !== userId) return u;                                                   
      254 +      return { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" ? "
          +suspended" : "banned" };                                                               
      255 +    }));                                                                               
      256 +    if (selectedUser?.id === userId) {                                                 
      257 +      setSelectedUser(u => u ? { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action
          + === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" } : null);                                     
      258 +    }                                                                                  
      259 +  };                                                                                   
      260 +                                                                                       
      261 +  const memColor: Record<string, string> = { VVIP: "#FFD700", VIP: ACCENT, "일반": "rgb
          +a(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                                 
      262 +  const roleColor: Record<string, string> = { admin: DANGER, host: ACCENT2, user: "rgba
          +(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                                                  
      263 +                                                                                       
      264 +  return (                                                                             
      265 +    <div className="flex gap-4 h-full">                                                
      266 +      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-0">                             
      267 +        {/* Filters */}                                                                
      268 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                         
      269 +          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[180px]">                              
      270 +            <Icon icon="solar:magnifer-linear" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -tran
          +slate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/30" />                                                  
      271 +            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder
          +="이름 또는 이메일 검색"                                                               
      272 +              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm text-white outline-
          +none"                                                                                  
      273 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(25
          +5,255,255,0.1)", caretColor: ACCENT }} />                                              
      274 +          </div>                                                                       
      275 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                               
      276 +            {["전체", "active", "suspended", "banned"].map(s => (                      
      277 +              <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                       
      278 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"    
      279 +                style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px s
          +olid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1
          +px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>

      404 +// ─── Tab: 룸관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      
      405 +function RoomsTab({ terminatedRooms, onForceEnd }: { terminatedRooms: Set<string>; onFo
          +rceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                      
      406 +  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("전체");                                
      407 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                            
      408 +                                                                                       
      409 +  const filtered = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => {                                            
      410 +    const matchType = filterType === "전체" || r.type === filterType;                  
      411 +    const status = terminatedRooms.has(r.id) ? "ended" : r.status;                     
      412 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || status === filterStatus;            
      413 +    return matchType && matchStatus;                                                   
      414 +  });                                                                                  
      415 +                                                                                       
      416 +  return (                                                                             
      417 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">

      422 +            <button key={t} onClick={() => setFilterType(t)}                           
      423 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"      
      424 +              style={filterType === t ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px solid
          + ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px s
          +olid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                       
      425 +              {t}

          +lid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "
          +1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>

          +예정" : "종료"}                                                                        
      435 +            </button>

      444 +          const status = isTerminated ? "ended" : room.status;

      521 +// ─── Tab: 정산관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    
      522 +function SettlementsTab() {                                                            
      523 +  const [settled, setSettled] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                      
      524 +  const [confirmId, setConfirmId] = useState<string | null>(null);                     
      525 +                                                                                       
      526 +  const hosts = MOCK_USERS.filter(u => u.role === "host");                             
      527 +  const totalPending = hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).reduce((s, h) => s + Math.
          +floor(h.balance * 0.3), 0);                                                            
      528 +                                                                                       
      529 +  const doSettle = (id: string) => {                                                   
      530 +    setSettled(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                              
      531 +    setConfirmId(null);                                                                
      532 +  };                                                                                   
      533 +                                                                                       
      534 +  return (                                                                             
      535 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                              
      536 +      {/* Summary */}                                                                  
      537 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                          
      538 +        <KPICard label="정산 대기" value={`₩${(totalPending * 10).toLocaleString()}`} s
          +ub={`${hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).length}명`} icon="solar:clock-circle-bold"
          + color={WARN} />                                                                       
      539 +        <KPICard label="이번 달 완료" value={`₩${(2_450_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub="1
          +8건 처리" icon="solar:check-circle-bold" color={SUCCESS} />                            
      540 +        <KPICard label="플랫폼 수익 (50%)" value={`₩${(1_225_000).toLocaleString()}`} s
          +ub="이번 달" icon="solar:graph-up-bold" color={ACCENT} />                              
      541 +      </div>                                                                           
      542 +                                                                                       
      543 +      {/* Distribution note */}                                                        
      544 +      <div className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex gap-3 items-start" style={{ background: `${A
          +CCENT}08`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}20` }}>                                         
      545 +        <Icon icon="solar:info-circle-bold" className="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" st
          +yle={{ color: ACCENT }} />                                                             
      546 +        <div className="text-xs text-white/50">                                        
      547 +          <span className="font-bold text-white/70">수익 분배 구조: </span>            
      548 +          플랫폼 50% · 감독/PD 20% · 호스트 30%.                                       
      549 +          각 정산건은 월말 기준 익월 5일 이내 처리됩니다.                              
      550 +        </div>                                                                         
      551 +      </div>                                                                           
      552 +                                                                                       
      553 +      {/* Pending settlements table */}                                                
      554 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,2
          +55,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                              
      555 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b flex items-center justify-between" style={
          +{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                            
      556 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">호스트 정산 내역</p>             
      557 +          <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs f
          +ont-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                              
      558 +            style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}12`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30`, colo
          +r: SUCCESS }}>                                                                         
      559 +            <Icon icon="solar:download-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />전체 내보내기   
      560 +          </button>                                                                    
      561 +        </div>                                                                         
      562 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                              
      563 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">                                           
      564 +            <thead>                                                                    
      565 +              <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>        
      566 +                {["호스트", "멤버십", "총 수익", "호스트 몫 (30%)", "정산 상태"].map(h 
          +=> (                                                                                   
      567 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium 
          +whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                                            
      568 +                ))}                                                                    
      569 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>          
      570 +              </tr>                                                                    
      571 +            </thead>                                                                   
      572 +            <tbody>                                                                    
      573 +              {hosts.map(host => {                                                     
      574 +                const gross = host.balance;                                            
      575 +                const hostCut = Math.floor(gross * 0.3);                               
      576 +                const isSettled = settled.has(host.id);                                
      577 +                return (                                                               
      578 +                  <tr key={host.id} className="border-t hover:bg-white/[0.02] transitio
          +n-colors" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                           
      579 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-medium text-white/85">{host.name}</td
          +>                                                                                      
      580 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                         
      581 +                      <Badge text={host.membership} color={host.membership === "VVIP" ?
          + "#FFD700" : host.membership === "VIP" ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)"} />          
      582 +                    </td>                                                              
      583 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-white/60">₩{(gross * 10).to
          +LocaleString()}</td>                                                                   
      584 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono font-bold" style={{ color: WARN 
          +}}>₩{(hostCut * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                             
      585 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                         
      586 +                      <StatusBadge status={isSettled ? "reviewed" : "pending"} />      
      587 +                    </td>                                                              
      588 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                         
      589 +                      {!isSettled ? (                                                  
      590 +                        <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(host.id)}                  
      591 +                          className="px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold transit
          +ion-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                                              
      592 +                          style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUC
          +CESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                                           
      593 +                          정산처리                                                     
      594 +                        </button>                                                      
      595 +                      ) : (                                                            
      596 +                        <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30">완료</span>        
      597 +                      )}                                                               
      598 +                    </td>                                                              
      599 +                  </tr>                                                                
      600 +                );                                                                     
      601 +              })}                                                                      
      602 +            </tbody>                                                                   
      603 +          </table>                                                                     
      604 +        </div>                                                                         
      605 +      </div>                                                                           
      606 +                                                                                       
      607 +      {/* Confirm modal */}                                                            
      608 +      {confirmId && (                                                                  
      609 +        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center px-4" style
          +={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(12px)" }}>                   
      610 +          <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-5" style={{
          + background: "rgba(4,10,18,0.98)", border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30` }}>                
      611 +            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">                                  
      612 +              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" st
          +yle={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15` }}>                                                  
      613 +                <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color
          +: SUCCESS }} />                                                                        
      614 +              </div>                                                                   
      615 +              <div>                                                                    
      616 +                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">정산 처리 확인</p>         
      617 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{hosts.find(h => h.id === c
          +onfirmId)?.name}</p>                                                                   
      618 +              </div>                                                                   
      619 +            </div>                                                                     
      620 +            <p className="text-xs text-white/50 leading-relaxed">                      
      621 +              위 호스트에 대한 이번 달 정산을 처리합니다.                              
      622 +              정산 후 취소가 불가합니다. 계속하시겠습니까?                             
      623 +            </p>                                                                       
      624 +            <div className="flex gap-3">                                               
      625 +              <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(null)}                               
      626 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"  
      627 +                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(
          +255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" }}>                                  
      628 +                취소                                                                   
      629 +              </button>                                                                
      630 +              <button onClick={() => doSettle(confirmId)}                              
      631 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all ac
          +tive:scale-95"                                                                         
      632 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}50`, 
          +color: SUCCESS }}>                                                                     
      633 +                정산 처리                                                              
      634 +              </button>                                                                
      635 +            </div>                                                                     
      636 +          </div>                                                                       
      637 +        </div>                                                                         
      638 +      )}                                                                               
      639 +    </div>                                                                             
      640 +  );                                                                                   
      641 +}                                                                                      
      642 +                                                                                       
      643 +// ─── Tab: 신고관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    
      644 +function ReportsTab() {                                                                
      645 +  const [reports, setReports] = useState(MOCK_REPORTS);                                
      646 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                            
      647 +                                                                                       
      648 +  const filtered = filterStatus === "전체" ? reports : reports.filter(r => r.status ===
          + filterStatus);                                                                        
      649 +                                                                                       
      650 +  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: "reviewed" | "dismissed") => {             
      651 +    setReports(rs => rs.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, status } : r));                 
      652 +  };                                                                                   
      653 +                                                                                       
      654 +  const catColor: Record<string, string> = { spam: WARN, abuse: DANGER, inappropriate: 
          +"#F97316", other: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                           
      655 +  const catLabel: Record<string, string> = { spam: "스팸", abuse: "괴롭힘", inappropria
          +te: "부적절", other: "기타" };                                                         
      656 +                                                                                       
      657 +  return (                                                                             
      658 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                              
      659 +      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                   
      660 +        {["전체", "pending", "reviewed", "dismissed"].map(s => (                       
      661 +          <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                           
      662 +            className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"        
      663 +            style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid
          + ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER } : { background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px s
          +olid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                       
      664 +            {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "pending" ? "대기" : s === "reviewed" ? "검 
          +토완료" : "기각"}                                                                      
      665 +          </button>                                                                    
      666 +        ))}                                                                            
      667 +      </div>                                                                           
      668 +                                                                                       
      669 +      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">                                            
      670 +        {filtered.map(r => (                                                           
      671 +          <div key={r.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"              
      672 +            style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${r.statu
          +s === "pending" ? `${DANGER}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}>                       
      673 +            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">         
      674 +              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">                                    
      675 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                              
      676 +                  <Badge text={catLabel[r.category]} color={catColor[r.category]} />   
      677 +                  <StatusBadge status={r.status} />                                    
      678 +                  <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25">{r.at}</span>            
      679 +                </div>                                                                 
      680 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{r.reason}</p>        
      681 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40">                                  
      682 +                  <span className="text-white/60">{r.reporter}</span> → <span style={{ 
          +color: DANGER }}>{r.target}</span>                                                     
      683 +                </p>                                                                   
      684 +              </div>                                                                   
      685 +              {r.status === "pending" && (                                             
      686 +                <div className="flex gap-2">                                           
      687 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "reviewed")}               
      688 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all 
          +hover:opacity-80"                                                                      
      689 +                    style={{ background: `${ACCENT}12`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}35`
          +, color: ACCENT }}>                                                                    
      690 +                    검토 완료                                                          
      691 +                  </button>                                                            
      692 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "dismissed")}              
      693 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all 
          +hover:opacity-80"                                                                      
      694 +                    style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid r
          +gba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                              
      695 +                    기각                                                               
      696 +                  </button>                                                            
      697 +                </div>                                                                 
      698 +              )}                                                                       
      699 +            </div>                                                                     
      700 +          </div>                                                                       
      701 +        ))}                                                                            
      702 +        {filtered.length === 0 && (                                                    
      703 +          <div className="text-center py-12 text-white/20 text-sm">신고 내역이 없습니다
          +</div>                                                                                 
      704 +        )}                                                                             
      705 +      </div>                                                                           
      706 +    </div>                                                                             
      707 +  );                                                                                   
      708 +}

          + }) => (

❯ Build a complete authentication system for the L'Oxygène (Loxygène) Next.js project.                   
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STACK                                                                                                  
  ==============================================                                                         
  - NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) for session management                                                      
  - Supabase for database (users table)                                                                  
  - bcryptjs for password hashing                                                                        
  - Zod for form validation                                                                              
  - All UI in Korean                                                                                     
                                                                                                         
  Install dependencies first:                                                                            
  npm install next-auth@beta @auth/supabase-adapter supabase bcryptjs zod                                
  npm install -D @types/bcryptjs                                                                         
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 1 — Supabase Setup                                                                                
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create lib/supabase.ts:                                                                                
  - Supabase client using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY            
                                                                                                         
  Create the users table SQL (save as supabase/schema.sql):                                              
  ```sql                                                                                                 
  create table users (                                                                                   
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                       
    email text unique not null,                                                                          
    nickname text not null,                                                                              
    password_hash text,                                                                                  
    provider text default 'email',                                                                       
    provider_id text,                                                                                    
    avatar_url text,                                                                                     
    role text default 'user',                                                                            
    coins integer default 0,                                                                             
    created_at timestamptz default now(),                                                                
    updated_at timestamptz default now()                                                                 
  );                                                                                                     
  ```                                                                                                    
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 2 — NextAuth Configuration                                                                        
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create auth.ts at project root:                                                                        
  - Credentials provider (email + password)                                                              
  - Google OAuth provider (env: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET)                                  
  - Kakao OAuth provider (env: KAKAO_CLIENT_ID, KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET)                                     
  - JWT strategy                                                                                         
  - Session includes: id, nickname, role, coins, avatar_url                                              
  - callbacks: jwt (add custom fields), session (expose to client)                                       
                                                                                                         
  Create app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts                                                             
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 3 — Auth Pages                                                                                    
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/login/page.tsx ---                                                                        
  Design:                                                                                                
  - Full screen dark bg with subtle cyan/pink radial glow (same vibe as other pages)                     
  - Centered glass card (backdrop-blur, border border-white/10)                                          
  - L'Oxygène logo + tagline at top                                                                      
  - Email input + Password input (toggle visibility button)                                              
  - "로그인" button (full width, cyan glow)                                                              
  - Divider "또는"                                                                                       
  - Social login buttons:                                                                                
    - 구글로 계속하기 (white bg, Google icon)                                                            
    - 카카오로 계속하기 (kakao yellow #FEE500, kakao logo)                                               
  - "비밀번호 찾기" link → /auth/forgot-password                                                         
  - "계정이 없으신가요? 회원가입" link → /auth/register                                                  
  - Error display: red toast/inline message for wrong credentials                                        
  - On success: redirect to / (or the page they came from using callbackUrl)                             
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/register/page.tsx ---                                                                     
  Multi-step form (3 steps with progress bar):                                                           
                                                                                                         
  Step 1 — 기본 정보:                                                                                    
  - Email input (real-time format validation)                                                            
  - Password input (strength indicator bar: 약함/보통/강함/매우강함)                                     
  - Password confirm input                                                                               
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 2 — 프로필 설정:                                                                                  
  - Nickname input (2–16자, Korean/English/numbers only, real-time availability check mock)              
  - Avatar selector: 6 preset avatar options (colored circle with emoji, selectable)                     
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 3 — 약관 동의:                                                                                    
  - 전체 동의 checkbox (checks all below)                                                                
  - [필수] 서비스 이용약관 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                       
  - [필수] 개인정보 처리방침 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                     
  - [선택] 마케팅 정보 수신 동의                                                                         
  - "가입 완료" button (disabled until required boxes checked)                                           
  - On submit: POST to /api/auth/register → success modal → redirect to /auth/login                      
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/forgot-password/page.tsx ---                                                              
  - Email input                                                                                          
  - "재설정 메일 발송" button                                                                            
  - Mock success state: "이메일을 확인해주세요" with envelope animation                                  
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 4 — API Routes                                                                                    
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  app/api/auth/register/route.ts (POST):                                                                 
  - Validate with Zod (email, password min 8 chars, nickname)                                            
  - Check if email already exists in Supabase                                                            
  - Hash password with bcryptjs (saltRounds: 12)                                                         
  - Insert new user into Supabase users table                                                            
  - Return success or error JSON                                                                         
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 5 — Auth Guard & Session Integration                                                              
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Update middleware.ts:                                                                                  
  - Protected routes: /payments/*, /admin/* (admin role only), /rooms/*/[roomId]/*                       
  - If not authenticated → redirect to /auth/login?callbackUrl=<current_path>                            
  - If authenticated but not admin → redirect to / for /admin/* routes                                   
                                                                                                         
  Update app/layout.tsx:                                                                                 
  - Wrap with SessionProvider                                                                            
  - Header: show user avatar + nickname + coin balance if logged in, else "로그인" button                
                                                                                                         
  Update Header component (components/Header.tsx or wherever it lives):                                  
  - If logged in: avatar (circle, 32px), nickname, coin balance with 🪙 icon, dropdown menu:             
    - 마이페이지                                                                                         
    - 코인 충전 → /payments/charge                                                                       
    - 설정 → /control-panel                                                                              
    - 로그아웃                                                                                           
  - If not logged in: "로그인" button (cyan outline) + "회원가입" button (cyan filled)                   
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 6 — .env.local Template                                                                           
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create .env.local.example with all required variables:
