       85 +// ─── Small helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                        
       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: string; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; tre
          +nd?: "up" | "down" | "flat" }) {                                                                                                          
       87 +  return (                                                                                                                                
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,25
          +5,0.07)" }}>                                                                                                                              
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                                                                                 
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</span>                                                  
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: `${color}15` }}>                        
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                                                                      
       93 +        </div>                                                                                                                            
       94 +      </div>                                                                                                                              
       95 +      <div>                                                                                                                               
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>                                                                     
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                                                                         
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                                                                                  
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-green-400" />}                                    
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />}                                  
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS : trend === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }
          +}>{sub}</span>                                                                                                                            
      102 +          </div>                                                                                                                          
      103 +        )}                                                                                                                                
      104 +      </div>                                                                                                                              
      105 +    </div>                                                                                                                                
      106 +  );                                                                                                                                      
      107 +}                                                                                                                                         
      108 +                                                                                                                                          
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                                                                        
      110 +  return (                                                                                                                                
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, co
          +lor }}>                                                                                                                                   
      112 +      {text}                                                                                                                              
      113 +    </span>                                                                                                                               
      114 +  );                                                                                                                                      
      115 +}                                                                                                                                         
      116 +                                                                                                                                          
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                                                                                    
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                                                                         
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [WARN, "예정"],                                         
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"],                                                       
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "기각"],                                
      122 +  };                                                                                                                                      
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];                                                                
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                                                                            
      125 +}

      128 +function DashboardTab({ onForceEnd }: { onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                             
      129 +  const liveRooms = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => r.status === "live");                                                                          
      130 +  const totalLiveUsers = liveRooms.reduce((s, r) => s + r.participants, 0);                                                               
      131 +  const todayRevenue = MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.filter(t => t.type === "charge").reduce((s, t) => s + t.amount, 0);                              
      132 +                                                                                                                                          
      133 +  return (                                                                                                                                
      134 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                                                                                 
      135 +      {/* KPIs */}                                                                                                                        
      136 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">                                                                             
      137 +        <KPICard label="총 유저" value="8,421" sub="+127 오늘" icon="solar:users-group-rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />         
      138 +        <KPICard label="현재 접속" value={String(totalLiveUsers)} sub={`${liveRooms.length}개 방 활성`} icon="solar:pulse-2-bold" color={S
          +UCCESS} trend="up" />                                                                                                                     
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`} sub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" co
          +lor={WARN} trend="up" />                                                                                                                  
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status === "pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="sola
          +r:shield-warning-bold" color={DANGER} trend="flat" />                                                                                     
      141 +      </div>                                                                                                                              
      142 +                                                                                                                                          
      143 +      {/* Active rooms table */}                                                                                                          
      144 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06
          +)" }}>                                                                                                                                    
      145 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b flex items-center justify-between" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>        
      146 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">활성 룸</p>                                                                         
      147 +          <span className="text-xs text-white/30">{liveRooms.length}개 라이브</span>                                                      
      148 +        </div>                                                                                                                            
      149 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                 
      150 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">

      153 +                {["제목", "유형", "호스트", "인원", "수익"].map(h => (                                                                    
      154 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                        
      155 +                ))}                                                                                                                       
      156 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                             
      157 +              </tr>                                                                                                                       
      158 +            </thead>                                                                                                                      
      159 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                       
      160 +              {liveRooms.map(room => (                                                                                                    
      161 +                <tr key={room.id} className="border-t transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.02]" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.0
          +4)" }}>                                                                                                                                   
      162 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/80 font-medium max-w-[160px] truncate">{room.title}</td>                            
      163 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3"><Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} /></td>                                                
      164 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.host}</td>                                                                
      165 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                              
      166 +                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                                                                             
      167 +                      <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/10 max-w-[60px]">                                                
      168 +                        <div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(room.participants / room.maxParticipants) * 100}%`, backg
          +round: ACCENT }} />                                                                                                                       
      169 +                      </div>                                                                                                              
      170 +                      <span className="text-white/50 whitespace-nowrap">{room.participants}/{room.maxParticipants}</span>                 
      171 +                    </div>                                                                                                                
      172 +                  </td>                                                                                                                   
      173 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                
      174 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                              
      175 +                    <button onClick={() => onForceEnd(room.id)}

      183 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                      
      184 +          </table>                                                                                                                        
      185 +        </div>                                                                                                                            
      186 +      </div>                                                                                                                              
      187 +                                                                                                                                          
      188 +      {/* Recent transactions */}                                                                                                         
      189 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06
          +)" }}>                                                                                                                                    
      190 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                          
      191 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">최근 거래내역</p>                                                                   
      192 +        </div>                                                                                                                            
      193 +        <div className="divide-y" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                      
      194 +          {MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.map(tx => {                                                                                                  
      195 +            const typeColor = tx.type === "charge" ? SUCCESS : tx.type === "earn" ? ACCENT : tx.type === "settle" ? WARN : DANGER;        
      196 +            const typeLabel = tx.type === "charge" ? "충전" : tx.type === "earn" ? "수익" : tx.type === "settle" ? "정산" : "지출";       
      197 +            return (                                                                                                                      
      198 +              <div key={tx.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors"                      
      199 +                style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                                
      200 +                <Badge text={typeLabel} color={typeColor} />                                                                              
      201 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                                                                          
      202 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/70 truncate">{tx.user} — {tx.desc}</p>                                                 
      203 +                </div>                                                                                                                    
      204 +                <span className="text-xs font-bold tabular-nums whitespace-nowrap" style={{ color: tx.amount > 0 ? SUCCESS : "rgba(255,255

      208 +              </div>                                                                                                                      
      209 +            );                                                                                                                            
      210 +          })}                                                                                                                             
      211 +        </div>                                                                                                                            
      212 +      </div>
