      804 +                                                                                                                                          
      805 +// ─── Main Page ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                        
      806  export default function AdminPage() {
      807 +  const router = useRouter();                                                                                                             
      808 +  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("dashboard");                                                                                
      809 +  const [sidebarOpen, setSidebarOpen] = useState(false);                                                                                  
      810 +  const [terminatedRooms, setTerminatedRooms] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                                                         
      811 +                                                                                                                                          
      812 +  // Client-side admin guard: checks localStorage for admin role                                                                          
      813 +  useEffect(() => {                                                                                                                       
      814 +    try {                                                                                                                                 
      815 +      const role = localStorage.getItem("loxygene-role");                                                                                 
      816 +      // In dev/mock mode, allow if no role is set OR role is "admin"                                                                     
      817 +      if (role !== null && role !== "admin") {                                                                                            
      818 +        router.replace("/");                                                                                                              
      819 +      }                                                                                                                                   
      820 +    } catch {                                                                                                                             
      821 +      // localStorage unavailable (SSR or privacy mode) — allow through                                                                   
      822 +    }                                                                                                                                     
      823 +  }, [router]);                                                                                                                           
      824 +                                                                                                                                          
      825 +  const handleForceEnd = (id: string) => {                                                                                                
      826 +    setTerminatedRooms(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                                                                         
      827 +  };                                                                                                                                      
      828 +                                                                                                                                          
      829 +  const pendingReports = MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status === "pending").length;                                                         
      830 +                                                                                                                                          
      831    return (
        5 -    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#070707] flex items-center justify-center">                                                          
        6 -      <Link                                                                                                                               
        7 -        href="/"                                                                                                                          
        8 -        className="fixed top-4 left-4 z-50 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-medium text-[#00E5FF] bg-white/10
          - backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-[#00E5FF]/50 transition-all"                                                        
        9 -      >                                                                                                                                   
       10 -        ← L&apos;OXYGÈNE                                                                                                                  
       11 -      </Link>                                                                                                                             
       12 -      <div className="text-center">                                                                                                       
       13 -        <h1 className="text-3xl font-black text-white/20 tracking-widest">ADMIN</h1>                                                      
       14 -        <p className="text-white/20 mt-2">Coming Soon</p>                                                                                 
      832 +    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#060608] flex" style={{ fontFamily: "inherit" }}>                                                    
      833 +      {/* Mobile sidebar backdrop */}

❯ Build a complete authentication system for the L'Oxygène (Loxygène) Next.js project.                   
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STACK                                                                                                  
  ==============================================                                                         
  - NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) for session management                                                      
  - Supabase for database (users table)                                                                  
  - bcryptjs for password hashing                                                                        
  - Zod for form validation                                                                              
  - All UI in Korean                                                                                     
                                                                                                         
  Install dependencies first:                                                                            
  npm install next-auth@beta @auth/supabase-adapter supabase bcryptjs zod                                
  npm install -D @types/bcryptjs                                                                         
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 1 — Supabase Setup                                                                                
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create lib/supabase.ts:                                                                                
  - Supabase client using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY            
                                                                                                         
  Create the users table SQL (save as supabase/schema.sql):                                              
  ```sql                                                                                                 
  create table users (                                                                                   
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                       
    email text unique not null,                                                                          
    nickname text not null,                                                                              
    password_hash text,                                                                                  
    provider text default 'email',                                                                       
    provider_id text,                                                                                    
    avatar_url text,                                                                                     
    role text default 'user',                                                                            
    coins integer default 0,                                                                             
    created_at timestamptz default now(),                                                                
    updated_at timestamptz default now()                                                                 
  );                                                                                                     
  ```                                                                                                    
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 2 — NextAuth Configuration                                                                        
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create auth.ts at project root:                                                                        
  - Credentials provider (email + password)                                                              
  - Google OAuth provider (env: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET)                                  
  - Kakao OAuth provider (env: KAKAO_CLIENT_ID, KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET)                                     
  - JWT strategy                                                                                         
  - Session includes: id, nickname, role, coins, avatar_url                                              
  - callbacks: jwt (add custom fields), session (expose to client)                                       
                                                                                                         
  Create app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts                                                             
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 3 — Auth Pages                                                                                    
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/login/page.tsx ---                                                                        
  Design:                                                                                                
  - Full screen dark bg with subtle cyan/pink radial glow (same vibe as other pages)                     
  - Centered glass card (backdrop-blur, border border-white/10)                                          
  - L'Oxygène logo + tagline at top                                                                      
  - Email input + Password input (toggle visibility button)                                              
  - "로그인" button (full width, cyan glow)                                                              
  - Divider "또는"                                                                                       
  - Social login buttons:                                                                                
    - 구글로 계속하기 (white bg, Google icon)                                                            
    - 카카오로 계속하기 (kakao yellow #FEE500, kakao logo)                                               
  - "비밀번호 찾기" link → /auth/forgot-password                                                         
  - "계정이 없으신가요? 회원가입" link → /auth/register                                                  
  - Error display: red toast/inline message for wrong credentials                                        
  - On success: redirect to / (or the page they came from using callbackUrl)                             
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/register/page.tsx ---                                                                     
  Multi-step form (3 steps with progress bar):                                                           
                                                                                                         
  Step 1 — 기본 정보:                                                                                    
  - Email input (real-time format validation)                                                            
  - Password input (strength indicator bar: 약함/보통/강함/매우강함)                                     
  - Password confirm input                                                                               
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 2 — 프로필 설정:                                                                                  
  - Nickname input (2–16자, Korean/English/numbers only, real-time availability check mock)              
  - Avatar selector: 6 preset avatar options (colored circle with emoji, selectable)                     
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 3 — 약관 동의:                                                                                    
  - 전체 동의 checkbox (checks all below)                                                                
  - [필수] 서비스 이용약관 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                       
  - [필수] 개인정보 처리방침 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                     
  - [선택] 마케팅 정보 수신 동의                                                                         
  - "가입 완료" button (disabled until required boxes checked)                                           
  - On submit: POST to /api/auth/register → success modal → redirect to /auth/login                      
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/forgot-password/page.tsx ---                                                              
  - Email input                                                                                          
  - "재설정 메일 발송" button                                                                            
  - Mock success state: "이메일을 확인해주세요" with envelope animation                                  
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 4 — API Routes                                                                                    
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  app/api/auth/register/route.ts (POST):                                                                 
  - Validate with Zod (email, password min 8 chars, nickname)                                            
  - Check if email already exists in Supabase                                                            
  - Hash password with bcryptjs (saltRounds: 12)                                                         
  - Insert new user into Supabase users table                                                            
  - Return success or error JSON                                                                         
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 5 — Auth Guard & Session Integration                                                              
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Update middleware.ts:                                                                                  
  - Protected routes: /payments/*, /admin/* (admin role only), /rooms/*/[roomId]/*                       
  - If not authenticated → redirect to /auth/login?callbackUrl=<current_path>                            
  - If authenticated but not admin → redirect to / for /admin/* routes                                   
                                                                                                         
  Update app/layout.tsx:                                                                                 
  - Wrap with SessionProvider                                                                            
  - Header: show user avatar + nickname + coin balance if logged in, else "로그인" button                
                                                                                                         
  Update Header component (components/Header.tsx or wherever it lives):                                  
  - If logged in: avatar (circle, 32px), nickname, coin balance with 🪙 icon, dropdown menu:             
    - 마이페이지                                                                                         
    - 코인 충전 → /payments/charge                                                                       
    - 설정 → /control-panel                                                                              
    - 로그아웃                                                                                           
  - If not logged in: "로그인" button (cyan outline) + "회원가입" button (cyan filled)                   
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 6 — .env.local Template                                                                           
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create .env.local.example with all required variables:

       85 +// ─── Small helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                 
       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: string; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; trend?: "up"
          + | "down" | "flat" }) {                                                                                                                            
       87 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" 
          +}}>                                                                                                                                                
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                                                                                          
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</span>                                                           
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: `${color}15` }}>                                 
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                                                                               
       93 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
       94 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
       95 +      <div>                                                                                                                                        
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>                                                                              
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                                                                                  
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                                                                                           
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-green-400" />}                                             
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />}                                           
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS : trend === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{sub}</
          +span>                                                                                                                                              
      102 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      103 +        )}                                                                                                                                         
      104 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      105 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      106 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      107 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      108 +                                                                                                                                                   
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                                                                                 
      110 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, color }}>  
      112 +      {text}                                                                                                                                       
      113 +    </span>                                                                                                                                        
      114 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      115 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      116 +                                                                                                                                                   
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                                                                                             
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                                                                                  
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [WARN, "예정"],                                                  
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"],                                                                
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "기각"],                                         
      122 +  };                                                                                                                                               
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];                                                                         
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                                                                                     
      125 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      126 +

      128 +function DashboardTab({ onForceEnd }: { onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                                      
      129 +  const liveRooms = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => r.status === "live");

      131 +  const todayRevenue = MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.filter(t => t.type === "charge").reduce((s, t) => s + t.amount, 0);                                       
      132 +                                                                                                                                                   
      133 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      134 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                                                                                          
      135 +      {/* KPIs */}

      137 +        <KPICard label="총 유저" value="8,421" sub="+127 오늘" icon="solar:users-group-rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />

          +rend="up" />                                                                                                                                       
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`} sub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" color={WARN
          +} trend="up" />                                                                                                                                    
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status === "pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="solar:shield-
          +warning-bold" color={DANGER} trend="flat" />                                                                                                       
      141 +      </div>

          +CENT }} />

      187 +                                                                                                                                                   
      188 +      {/* Recent transactions */}                                                                                                                  
      189 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      190 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                   
      191 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">최근 거래내역</p>                                                                            
      192 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      193 +        <div className="divide-y" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                               
      194 +          {MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.map(tx => {                                                                                                           
      195 +            const typeColor = tx.type === "charge" ? SUCCESS : tx.type === "earn" ? ACCENT : tx.type === "settle" ? WARN : DANGER;                 
      196 +            const typeLabel = tx.type === "charge" ? "충전" : tx.type === "earn" ? "수익" : tx.type === "settle" ? "정산" : "지출";                
      197 +            return (                                                                                                                               
      198 +              <div key={tx.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors"                               
      199 +                style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                                         
      200 +                <Badge text={typeLabel} color={typeColor} />                                                                                       
      201 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                                                                                   
      202 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/70 truncate">{tx.user} — {tx.desc}</p>                                                          
      203 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      204 +                <span className="text-xs font-bold tabular-nums whitespace-nowrap" style={{ color: tx.amount > 0 ? SUCCESS : "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)
          +" }}>                                                                                                                                              
      205 +                  {tx.amount > 0 ? "+" : ""}₩{(tx.amount * 10).toLocaleString()}                                                                   
      206 +                </span>                                                                                                                            
      207 +                <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25 whitespace-nowrap">{tx.at}</span>                                                       
      208 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      209 +            );                                                                                                                                     
      210 +          })}                                                                                                                                      
      211 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      212 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      213 +                                                                                                                                                   
      214 +      {/* Quick Actions */}                                                                                                                        
      215 +      <div>                                                                                                                                        
      216 +        <p className="text-xs font-bold text-white/40 tracking-wider mb-3">빠른 액션</p>                                                           
      217 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">                                                                                                     
      218 +          {[                                                                                                                                       
      219 +            { label: "공지 발송", icon: "solar:megaphone-bold", color: ACCENT },                                                                   
      220 +            { label: "전체 정지", icon: "solar:pause-circle-bold", color: WARN },                                                                  
      221 +            { label: "DB 백업", icon: "solar:database-bold", color: ACCENT2 },                                                                     
      222 +            { label: "캐시 초기화", icon: "solar:refresh-bold", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" },                                                  
      223 +          ].map(a => (                                                                                                                             
      224 +            <button key={a.label} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all hover:opacity-80 act
          +ive:scale-95"                                                                                                                                      
      225 +              style={{ background: `${a.color}10`, border: `1px solid ${a.color}30`, color: a.color }}>                                            
      226 +              <Icon icon={a.icon} className="w-4 h-4" />                                                                                           
      227 +              {a.label}                                                                                                                            
      228 +            </button>                                                                                                                              
      229 +          ))}                                                                                                                                      
      230 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      231 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      232 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      233 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      234 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      235 +                                                                                                                                                   
      236 +// ─── Tab: 유저관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                
      237 +function UsersTab() {                                                                                                                              
      238 +  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");                                                                                                        
      239 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                        
      240 +  const [filterRole, setFilterRole] = useState("전체");                                                                                            
      241 +  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<User | null>(null);                                                                             
      242 +  const [users, setUsers] = useState(MOCK_USERS);                                                                                                  
      243 +                                                                                                                                                   
      244 +  const filtered = users.filter(u => {                                                                                                             
      245 +    const matchSearch = u.name.includes(search) || u.email.includes(search);                                                                       
      246 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || u.status === filterStatus;                                                                      
      247 +    const matchRole = filterRole === "전체" || u.role === filterRole;                                                                              
      248 +    return matchSearch && matchStatus && matchRole;                                                                                                
      249 +  });                                                                                                                                              
      250 +                                                                                                                                                   
      251 +  const handleAction = (userId: string, action: "suspend" | "ban" | "restore") => {                                                                
      252 +    setUsers(us => us.map(u => {                                                                                                                   
      253 +      if (u.id !== userId) return u;                                                                                                               
      254 +      return { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" };                                    
      255 +    }));                                                                                                                                           
      256 +    if (selectedUser?.id === userId) {                                                                                                             
      257 +      setSelectedUser(u => u ? { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" } : null);          
      258 +    }                                                                                                                                              
      259 +  };                                                                                                                                               
      260 +                                                                                                                                                   
      261 +  const memColor: Record<string, string> = { VVIP: "#FFD700", VIP: ACCENT, "일반": "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                      
      262 +  const roleColor: Record<string, string> = { admin: DANGER, host: ACCENT2, user: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                       
      263 +                                                                                                                                                   
      264 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      265 +    <div className="flex gap-4 h-full">                                                                                                            
      266 +      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-0">                                                                                         
      267 +        {/* Filters */}                                                                                                                            
      268 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                                                                                     
      269 +          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[180px]">                                                                                          
      270 +            <Icon icon="solar:magnifer-linear" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/30" />                       
      271 +            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="이름 또는 이메일 검색"                                    
      272 +              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm text-white outline-none"                                                       
      273 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", caretColor: ACCENT }} />                   
      274 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      275 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                           
      276 +            {["전체", "active", "suspended", "banned"].map(s => (                                                                                  
      277 +              <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                   
      278 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                
      279 +                style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255
          +,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                    
      280 +                {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "active" ? "정상" : s === "suspended" ? "정지" : "차단"}                                            
      281 +              </button>                                                                                                                            
      282 +            ))}                                                                                                                                    
      283 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      284 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                           
      285 +            {["전체", "user", "host", "admin"].map(r => (                                                                                          
      286 +              <button key={r} onClick={() => setFilterRole(r)}                                                                                     
      287 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                
      288 +                style={filterRole === r ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(25
          +5,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                   
      289 +                {r === "전체" ? "전체" : r === "user" ? "유저" : r === "host" ? "호스트" : "관리자"}                                               
      290 +              </button>                                                                                                                            
      291 +            ))}                                                                                                                                    
      292 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      293 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      294 +                                                                                                                                                   
      295 +        {/* Table */}                                                                                                                              
      296 +        <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex-1" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06
          +)" }}>                                                                                                                                             
      297 +          <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                        
      298 +            <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                     
      299 +              <thead>                                                                                                                              
      300 +                <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                                  
      301 +                  {["이름", "이메일", "역할", "멤버십", "잔액", "방 수", "신고", "상태", "가입일"].map(h => (                                      
      302 +                    <th key={h} className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                               
      303 +                  ))}                                                                                                                              
      304 +                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                                    
      305 +                </tr>                                                                                                                              
      306 +              </thead>                                                                                                                             
      307 +              <tbody>                                                                                                                              
      308 +                {filtered.map(u => (                                                                                                               
      309 +                  <tr key={u.id}                                                                                                                   
      310 +                    onClick={() => setSelectedUser(u)}                                                                                             
      311 +                    className="border-t cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.03]"                                                    
      312 +                    style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", background: selectedUser?.id === u.id ? "rgba(0,229,255,0.04)" : undefined }}> 
      313 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-white/85">{u.name}</td>                                                              
      314 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/40 max-w-[140px] truncate">{u.email}</td>                                                  
      315 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><Badge text={u.role === "admin" ? "관리자" : u.role === "host" ? "호스트" : "유저"} color={roleColor[
          +u.role]} /></td>                                                                                                                                   
      316 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><Badge text={u.membership} color={memColor[u.membership]} /></td>                                    
      317 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-white/60">₩{(u.balance * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                    
      318 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/50">{u.rooms}</td>                                                                         
      319 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3" style={{ color: u.reports > 0 ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{u.reports}</td>                 
      320 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><StatusBadge status={u.status} /></td>                                                               
      321 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/30">{u.joined}</td>                                                                        
      322 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3">                                                                                                     
      323 +                      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                               
      324 +                        {u.status === "active" && (                                                                                                
      325 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "suspend"); }}                                           
      326 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                 
      327 +                            style={{ background: `${WARN}15`, border: `1px solid ${WARN}40`, color: WARN }}>정지</button>                          
      328 +                        )}                                                                                                                         
      329 +                        {u.status !== "banned" && (                                                                                                
      330 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "ban"); }}                                               
      331 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                 
      332 +                            style={{ background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER }}>차단</button>                    
      333 +                        )}                                                                                                                         
      334 +                        {u.status !== "active" && (                                                                                                
      335 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "restore"); }}                                           
      336 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                 
      337 +                            style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>복구</button>                 
      338 +                        )}                                                                                                                         
      339 +                      </div>                                                                                                                       
      340 +                    </td>                                                                                                                          
      341 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                            
      342 +                ))}                                                                                                                                
      343 +              </tbody>                                                                                                                             
      344 +            </table>                                                                                                                               
      345 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      346 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      347 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      348 +                                                                                                                                                   
      349 +      {/* User detail panel */}                                                                                                                    
      350 +      {selectedUser && (                                                                                                                           
      351 +        <div className="w-72 flex-shrink-0 rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 self-start sticky top-0"                                            
      352 +          style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>                                            
      353 +          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">                                                                                       
      354 +            <div>                                                                                                                                  
      355 +              <p className="font-bold text-white">{selectedUser.name}</p>                                                                          
      356 +              <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{selectedUser.email}</p>                                                                 
      357 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      358 +            <button onClick={() => setSelectedUser(null)} className="text-white/30 hover:text-white/60">                                           
      359 +              <Icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold" className="w-5 h-5" />                                                                          
      360 +            </button>                                                                                                                              
      361 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      362 +          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">                                                                                                   
      363 +            <StatusBadge status={selectedUser.status} />                                                                                           
      364 +            <Badge text={selectedUser.membership} color={memColor[selectedUser.membership]} />                                                     
      365 +            <Badge text={selectedUser.role === "host" ? "호스트" : selectedUser.role === "admin" ? "관리자" : "유저"} color={roleColor[selectedUser
          +.role]} />                                                                                                                                         
      366 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      367 +          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 text-xs">                                                                                            
      368 +            {[                                                                                                                                     
      369 +              ["잔액", `₩${(selectedUser.balance * 10).toLocaleString()}`],                                                                        
      370 +              ["개설 룸 수", `${selectedUser.rooms}개`],                                                                                           
      371 +              ["신고 횟수", `${selectedUser.reports}회`],                                                                                          
      372 +              ["가입일", selectedUser.joined],                                                                                                     
      373 +            ].map(([k, v]) => (                                                                                                                    
      374 +              <div key={k} className="flex justify-between">                                                                                       
      375 +                <span className="text-white/30">{k}</span>                                                                                         
      376 +                <span className="text-white/70 font-medium">{v}</span>                                                                             
      377 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      378 +            ))}                                                                                                                                    
      379 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      380 +          <div className="pt-2 border-t flex flex-col gap-2" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                    
      381 +            <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 tracking-wider font-medium">계정 관리</p>                                                      
      382 +            {selectedUser.status === "active" && (                                                                                                 
      383 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "suspend")}                                                                     
      384 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                               
      385 +                style={{ background: `${WARN}15`, border: `1px solid ${WARN}40`, color: WARN }}>계정 정지</button>                                 
      386 +            )}                                                                                                                                     
      387 +            {selectedUser.status !== "banned" && (                                                                                                 
      388 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "ban")}                                                                         
      389 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                               
      390 +                style={{ background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER }}>강제 탈퇴</button>                           
      391 +            )}                                                                                                                                     
      392 +            {selectedUser.status !== "active" && (                                                                                                 
      393 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "restore")}                                                                     
      394 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                               
      395 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>계정 복구</button>                        
      396 +            )}                                                                                                                                     
      397 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      398 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      399 +      )}                                                                                                                                           
      400 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      401 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      402 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      403 +                                                                                                                                                   
      404 +// ─── Tab: 룸관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                  
      405 +function RoomsTab({ terminatedRooms, onForceEnd }: { terminatedRooms: Set<string>; onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                           
      406 +  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("전체");                                                                                            
      407 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                        
      408 +                                                                                                                                                   
      409 +  const filtered = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => {                                                                                                        
      410 +    const matchType = filterType === "전체" || r.type === filterType;                                                                              
      411 +    const status = terminatedRooms.has(r.id) ? "ended" : r.status;                                                                                 
      412 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || status === filterStatus;                                                                        
      413 +    return matchType && matchStatus;                                                                                                               
      414 +  });                                                                                                                                              
      415 +                                                                                                                                                   
      416 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      417 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                                                                                          
      418 +      {/* Filters */}                                                                                                                              
      419 +      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                                                                                       
      420 +        <div className="flex gap-1.5 flex-wrap">                                                                                                   
      421 +          {["전체", "DJ", "토크쇼", "버라이어티", "가라오케"].map(t => (                                                                           
      422 +            <button key={t} onClick={() => setFilterType(t)}                                                                                       
      423 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                  
      424 +              style={filterType === t ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255
          +,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                        
      425 +              {t}                                                                                                                                  
      426 +            </button>                                                                                                                              
      427 +          ))}                                                                                                                                      
      428 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      429 +        <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                             
      430 +          {["전체", "live", "scheduled", "ended"].map(s => (                                                                                       
      431 +            <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                     
      432 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                  
      433 +              style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(25
          +5,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                   
      434 +              {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "live" ? "라이브" : s === "scheduled" ? "예정" : "종료"}                                              
      435 +            </button>                                                                                                                              
      436 +          ))}                                                                                                                                      
      437 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      438 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      439 +                                                                                                                                                   
      440 +      {/* Active rooms grid */}                                                                                                                    
      441 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                                                                       
      442 +        {filtered.map(room => {                                                                                                                    
      443 +          const isTerminated = terminatedRooms.has(room.id);                                                                                       
      444 +          const status = isTerminated ? "ended" : room.status;                                                                                     
      445 +          return (                                                                                                                                 
      446 +            <div key={room.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"                                                                     
      447 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${status === "live" ? `${ACCENT}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}
          +>                                                                                                                                                  
      448 +              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">                                                                             
      449 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                                                                                   
      450 +                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">                                                                                   
      451 +                    <StatusBadge status={status} />                                                                                                
      452 +                    <Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} />                                                                                      
      453 +                  </div>                                                                                                                           
      454 +                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white/85 leading-snug">{room.title}</p>                                                     
      455 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{room.host} · 시작 {room.started}</p>                                                
      456 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      457 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      458 +              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-white/40">                                                                      
      459 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">                                                                                          
      460 +                  <Icon icon="solar:users-group-two-rounded-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />                                                       
      461 +                  <span>{room.participants}/{room.maxParticipants}</span>                                                                          
      462 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      463 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">                                                                                          
      464 +                  <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: WARN }} />                                          
      465 +                  <span style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</span>                                                     
      466 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      467 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      468 +              {/* Participant bar */}                                                                                                              
      469 +              <div className="h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/10">                                                                                     
      470 +                <div className="h-full rounded-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${(room.participants / room.maxParticipants) * 100}%`, backgro
          +und: status === "live" ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" }} />                                                                                   
      471 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      472 +              {status === "live" && (                                                                                                              
      473 +                <button onClick={() => onForceEnd(room.id)}                                                                                        
      474 +                  className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                             
      475 +                  style={{ background: `${DANGER}12`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}35`, color: DANGER }}>                                           
      476 +                  강제 종료                                                                                                                        
      477 +                </button>                                                                                                                          
      478 +              )}                                                                                                                                   
      479 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      480 +          );                                                                                                                                       
      481 +        })}                                                                                                                                        
      482 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      483 +                                                                                                                                                   
      484 +      {/* Room history */}                                                                                                                         
      485 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      486 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                   
      487 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">오늘의 룸 히스토리</p>                                                                       
      488 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      489 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                          
      490 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                       
      491 +            <thead>                                                                                                                                
      492 +              <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>
