      493 +                {["제목", "유형", "호스트", "시작", "참여자", "수익", "상태"].map(h => (                                                           
      494 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                 
      495 +                ))}                                                                                                                                
      496 +              </tr>                                                                                                                                
      497 +            </thead>                                                                                                                               
      498 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                                
      499 +              {MOCK_ROOMS.map(room => {                                                                                                            
      500 +                const status = terminatedRooms.has(room.id) ? "ended" : room.status;                                                               
      501 +                return (                                                                                                                           
      502 +                  <tr key={room.id} className="border-t hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>
      503 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/75 max-w-[150px] truncate">{room.title}</td>                                               
      504 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3"><Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} /></td>                                                       
      505 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.host}</td>                                                                       
      506 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/40">{room.started}</td>                                                                    
      507 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.participants}명</td>                                                             
      508 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                       
      509 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3"><StatusBadge status={status} /></td>                                                                 
      510 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                            
      511 +                );                                                                                                                                 
      512 +              })}                                                                                                                                  
      513 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                               
      514 +          </table>                                                                                                                                 
      515 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      516 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      517 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      518 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      519 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      520 +                                                                                                                                                   
      521 +// ─── Tab: 정산관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                
      522 +function SettlementsTab() {                                                                                                                        
      523 +  const [settled, setSettled] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                                                                                  
      524 +  const [confirmId, setConfirmId] = useState<string | null>(null);                                                                                 
      525 +                                                                                                                                                   
      526 +  const hosts = MOCK_USERS.filter(u => u.role === "host");                                                                                         
      527 +  const totalPending = hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).reduce((s, h) => s + Math.floor(h.balance * 0.3), 0);                                 
      528 +                                                                                                                                                   
      529 +  const doSettle = (id: string) => {                                                                                                               
      530 +    setSettled(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                                                                                          
      531 +    setConfirmId(null);                                                                                                                            
      532 +  };                                                                                                                                               
      533 +                                                                                                                                                   
      534 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      535 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                                                                                          
      536 +      {/* Summary */}                                                                                                                              
      537 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                                                                                      
      538 +        <KPICard label="정산 대기" value={`₩${(totalPending * 10).toLocaleString()}`} sub={`${hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).length}명`} ico
          +n="solar:clock-circle-bold" color={WARN} />                                                                                                        
      539 +        <KPICard label="이번 달 완료" value={`₩${(2_450_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub="18건 처리" icon="solar:check-circle-bold" color={SUCCESS} /> 
      540 +        <KPICard label="플랫폼 수익 (50%)" value={`₩${(1_225_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub="이번 달" icon="solar:graph-up-bold" color={ACCENT} />   
      541 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      542 +                                                                                                                                                   
      543 +      {/* Distribution note */}                                                                                                                    
      544 +      <div className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex gap-3 items-start" style={{ background: `${ACCENT}08`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}20` }}>              
      545 +        <Icon icon="solar:info-circle-bold" className="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" style={{ color: ACCENT }} />                                  
      546 +        <div className="text-xs text-white/50">                                                                                                    
      547 +          <span className="font-bold text-white/70">수익 분배 구조: </span>                                                                        
      548 +          플랫폼 50% · 감독/PD 20% · 호스트 30%.                                                                                                   
      549 +          각 정산건은 월말 기준 익월 5일 이내 처리됩니다.                                                                                          
      550 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      551 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      552 +                                                                                                                                                   
      553 +      {/* Pending settlements table */}                                                                                                            
      554 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      555 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b flex items-center justify-between" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                 
      556 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">호스트 정산 내역</p>                                                                         
      557 +          <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                   
      558 +            style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}12`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                              
      559 +            <Icon icon="solar:download-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />전체 내보내기                                                               
      560 +          </button>                                                                                                                                
      561 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      562 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                          
      563 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                       
      564 +            <thead>                                                                                                                                
      565 +              <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>                                                                    
      566 +                {["호스트", "멤버십", "총 수익", "호스트 몫 (30%)", "정산 상태"].map(h => (                                                        
      567 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                 
      568 +                ))}                                                                                                                                
      569 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                                      
      570 +              </tr>                                                                                                                                
      571 +            </thead>                                                                                                                               
      572 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                                
      573 +              {hosts.map(host => {                                                                                                                 
      574 +                const gross = host.balance;                                                                                                        
      575 +                const hostCut = Math.floor(gross * 0.3);                                                                                           
      576 +                const isSettled = settled.has(host.id);                                                                                            
      577 +                return (                                                                                                                           
      578 +                  <tr key={host.id} className="border-t hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>
      579 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-medium text-white/85">{host.name}</td>                                                           
      580 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                     
      581 +                      <Badge text={host.membership} color={host.membership === "VVIP" ? "#FFD700" : host.membership === "VIP" ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,
          +255,255,0.4)"} />                                                                                                                                  
      582 +                    </td>                                                                                                                          
      583 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-white/60">₩{(gross * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                        
      584 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono font-bold" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(hostCut * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                  
      585 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                     
      586 +                      <StatusBadge status={isSettled ? "reviewed" : "pending"} />                                                                  
      587 +                    </td>                                                                                                                          
      588 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                     
      589 +                      {!isSettled ? (                                                                                                              
      590 +                        <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(host.id)}                                                                              
      591 +                          className="px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                   
      592 +                          style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                
      593 +                          정산처리                                                                                                                 
      594 +                        </button>                                                                                                                  
      595 +                      ) : (                                                                                                                        
      596 +                        <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30">완료</span>                                                                    
      597 +                      )}                                                                                                                           
      598 +                    </td>                                                                                                                          
      599 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                            
      600 +                );                                                                                                                                 
      601 +              })}                                                                                                                                  
      602 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                               
      603 +          </table>                                                                                                                                 
      604 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      605 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      606 +                                                                                                                                                   
      607 +      {/* Confirm modal */}                                                                                                                        
      608 +      {confirmId && (                                                                                                                              
      609 +        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center px-4" style={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(12
          +px)" }}>                                                                                                                                           
      610 +          <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-5" style={{ background: "rgba(4,10,18,0.98)", border: `1px solid ${SUCC
          +ESS}30` }}>                                                                                                                                        
      611 +            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">                                                                                              
      612 +              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15` }}>                       
      613 +                <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color: SUCCESS }} />                                             
      614 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      615 +              <div>                                                                                                                                
      616 +                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">정산 처리 확인</p>                                                                     
      617 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{hosts.find(h => h.id === confirmId)?.name}</p>                                        
      618 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      619 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      620 +            <p className="text-xs text-white/50 leading-relaxed">                                                                                  
      621 +              위 호스트에 대한 이번 달 정산을 처리합니다.                                                                                          
      622 +              정산 후 취소가 불가합니다. 계속하시겠습니까?                                                                                         
      623 +            </p>                                                                                                                                   
      624 +            <div className="flex gap-3">                                                                                                           
      625 +              <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(null)}                                                                                           
      626 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"                                                              
      627 +                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" }}>       
      628 +                취소                                                                                                                               
      629 +              </button>                                                                                                                            
      630 +              <button onClick={() => doSettle(confirmId)}                                                                                          
      631 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all active:scale-95"                                              
      632 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}50`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                          
      633 +                정산 처리                                                                                                                          
      634 +              </button>                                                                                                                            
      635 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      636 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      637 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      638 +      )}                                                                                                                                           
      639 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      640 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      641 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      642 +                                                                                                                                                   
      643 +// ─── Tab: 신고관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                
      644 +function ReportsTab() {                                                                                                                            
      645 +  const [reports, setReports] = useState(MOCK_REPORTS);                                                                                            
      646 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                        
      647 +                                                                                                                                                   
      648 +  const filtered = filterStatus === "전체" ? reports : reports.filter(r => r.status === filterStatus);                                             
      649 +                                                                                                                                                   
      650 +  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: "reviewed" | "dismissed") => {                                                                         
      651 +    setReports(rs => rs.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, status } : r));                                                                             
      652 +  };                                                                                                                                               
      653 +                                                                                                                                                   
      654 +  const catColor: Record<string, string> = { spam: WARN, abuse: DANGER, inappropriate: "#F97316", other: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                
      655 +  const catLabel: Record<string, string> = { spam: "스팸", abuse: "괴롭힘", inappropriate: "부적절", other: "기타" };                              
      656 +                                                                                                                                                   
      657 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      658 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                                                                                          
      659 +      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                               
      660 +        {["전체", "pending", "reviewed", "dismissed"].map(s => (                                                                                   
      661 +          <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                       
      662 +            className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                    
      663 +            style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER } : { background: "rgba(255,255
          +,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                        
      664 +            {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "pending" ? "대기" : s === "reviewed" ? "검토완료" : "기각"}                                            
      665 +          </button>                                                                                                                                
      666 +        ))}                                                                                                                                        
      667 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      668 +                                                                                                                                                   
      669 +      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">                                                                                                        
      670 +        {filtered.map(r => (                                                                                                                       
      671 +          <div key={r.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"                                                                          
      672 +            style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${r.status === "pending" ? `${DANGER}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}`
          + }}>                                                                                                                                               
      673 +            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">                                                                     
      674 +              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">                                                                                                
      675 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                                                                                          
      676 +                  <Badge text={catLabel[r.category]} color={catColor[r.category]} />                                                               
      677 +                  <StatusBadge status={r.status} />                                                                                                
      678 +                  <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25">{r.at}</span>                                                                        
      679 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      680 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{r.reason}</p>                                                                    
      681 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40">                                                                                              
      682 +                  <span className="text-white/60">{r.reporter}</span> → <span style={{ color: DANGER }}>{r.target}</span>                          
      683 +                </p>                                                                                                                               
      684 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      685 +              {r.status === "pending" && (                                                                                                         
      686 +                <div className="flex gap-2">                                                                                                       
      687 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "reviewed")}                                                                           
      688 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                           
      689 +                    style={{ background: `${ACCENT}12`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}35`, color: ACCENT }}>                                         
      690 +                    검토 완료                                                                                                                      
      691 +                  </button>                                                                                                                        
      692 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "dismissed")}                                                                          
      693 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                           
      694 +                    style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>   
      695 +                    기각                                                                                                                           
      696 +                  </button>                                                                                                                        
      697 +                </div>                                                                                                                             
      698 +              )}                                                                                                                                   
      699 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      700 +          </div>                                                                                                                                   
      701 +        ))}                                                                                                                                        
      702 +        {filtered.length === 0 && (                                                                                                                
      703 +          <div className="text-center py-12 text-white/20 text-sm">신고 내역이 없습니다</div>                                                      
      704 +        )}                                                                                                                                         
      705 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      706 +    </div>                                                                                                                                         
      707 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      708 +}                                                                                                                                                  
      709 +                                                                                                                                                   
      710 +// ─── Tab: 시스템설정 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                               
      711 +function SystemSettingsTab() {                                                                                                                     
      712 +  const [maintenance, setMaintenance] = useState(false);                                                                                           
      713 +  const [newUserReg, setNewUserReg] = useState(true);                                                                                              
      714 +  const [roomCreation, setRoomCreation] = useState(true);                                                                                          
      715 +  const [maxRoomSize, setMaxRoomSize] = useState(500);                                                                                             
      716 +  const [maxRooms, setMaxRooms] = useState(50);                                                                                                    
      717 +  const [commissionRate, setCommissionRate] = useState(50);                                                                                        
      718 +                                                                                                                                                   
      719 +  const Toggle = ({ value, onChange }: { value: boolean; onChange: (v: boolean) => void }) => (                                                    
      720 +    <button onClick={() => onChange(!value)}                                                                                                       
      721 +      className="relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors flex-shrink-0"                                                                   
      722 +      style={{ background: value ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" }}>                                                                            
      723 +      <div className="absolute top-1 w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white shadow transition-all" style={{ left: value ? "calc(100% - 20px)" : "4px" }} /> 
      724 +    </button>                                                                                                                                      
      725 +  );                                                                                                                                               
      726 +                                                                                                                                                   
      727 +  return (                                                                                                                                         
      728 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 max-w-2xl">                                                                                                
      729 +      {/* Toggles */}                                                                                                                              
      730 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      731 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                   
      732 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">서비스 설정</p>                                                                              
      733 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      734 +        <div className="divide-y" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>                                                               
      735 +          {[                                                                                                                                       
      736 +            { label: "유지보수 모드", desc: "활성화 시 일반 유저의 접속을 차단합니다", value: maintenance, onChange: setMaintenance, color: DANGER 
          +},                                                                                                                                                 
      737 +            { label: "신규 회원가입", desc: "신규 유저의 회원가입을 허용합니다", value: newUserReg, onChange: setNewUserReg, color: ACCENT },      
      738 +            { label: "룸 생성 허용", desc: "호스트의 새 룸 개설을 허용합니다", value: roomCreation, onChange: setRoomCreation, color: ACCENT },    
      739 +          ].map(row => (                                                                                                                           
      740 +            <div key={row.label} className="flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-4" style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>
      741 +              <div>                                                                                                                                
      742 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{row.label}</p>                                                                   
      743 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/35 mt-0.5">{row.desc}</p>                                                                         
      744 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      745 +              <Toggle value={row.value} onChange={row.onChange} />                                                                                 
      746 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      747 +          ))}                                                                                                                                      
      748 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      749 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      750 +                                                                                                                                                   
      751 +      {/* Numeric settings */}                                                                                                                     
      752 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>   
      753 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                   
      754 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">룸 제한 설정</p>                                                                             
      755 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      756 +        <div className="px-5 py-4 flex flex-col gap-5">                                                                                            
      757 +          {[                                                                                                                                       
      758 +            { label: "최대 룸 인원", value: maxRoomSize, onChange: setMaxRoomSize, min: 10, max: 1000, step: 10, unit: "명" },                     
      759 +            { label: "동시 최대 룸 수", value: maxRooms, onChange: setMaxRooms, min: 5, max: 200, step: 5, unit: "개" },                           
      760 +            { label: "플랫폼 수수료율", value: commissionRate, onChange: setCommissionRate, min: 10, max: 70, step: 5, unit: "%" },                
      761 +          ].map(s => (                                                                                                                             
      762 +            <div key={s.label} className="flex flex-col gap-2">                                                                                    
      763 +              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                                                                                  
      764 +                <span className="text-xs text-white/50">{s.label}</span>                                                                           
      765 +                <span className="text-sm font-bold tabular-nums" style={{ color: ACCENT }}>{s.value}{s.unit}</span>                                
      766 +              </div>                                                                                                                               
      767 +              <input type="range" min={s.min} max={s.max} step={s.step} value={s.value}                                                            
      768 +                onChange={e => s.onChange(Number(e.target.value))}                                                                                 
      769 +                className="w-full" style={{ accentColor: ACCENT }} />                                                                              
      770 +            </div>                                                                                                                                 
      771 +          ))}                                                                                                                                      
      772 +        </div>                                                                                                                                     
      773 +      </div>                                                                                                                                       
      774 +                                                                                                                                                   
      775 +      {/* Save */}

❯ Build a complete authentication system for the L'Oxygène (Loxygène) Next.js project.                   
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STACK                                                                                                  
  ==============================================                                                         
  - NextAuth.js v5 (Auth.js) for session management                                                      
  - Supabase for database (users table)                                                                  
  - bcryptjs for password hashing                                                                        
  - Zod for form validation                                                                              
  - All UI in Korean                                                                                     
                                                                                                         
  Install dependencies first:                                                                            
  npm install next-auth@beta @auth/supabase-adapter supabase bcryptjs zod                                
  npm install -D @types/bcryptjs                                                                         
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 1 — Supabase Setup                                                                                
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create lib/supabase.ts:                                                                                
  - Supabase client using env vars NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY            
                                                                                                         
  Create the users table SQL (save as supabase/schema.sql):                                              
  ```sql                                                                                                 
  create table users (                                                                                   
    id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,                                                       
    email text unique not null,                                                                          
    nickname text not null,                                                                              
    password_hash text,                                                                                  
    provider text default 'email',                                                                       
    provider_id text,                                                                                    
    avatar_url text,                                                                                     
    role text default 'user',                                                                            
    coins integer default 0,                                                                             
    created_at timestamptz default now(),                                                                
    updated_at timestamptz default now()                                                                 
  );                                                                                                     
  ```                                                                                                    
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 2 — NextAuth Configuration                                                                        
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  Create auth.ts at project root:                                                                        
  - Credentials provider (email + password)                                                              
  - Google OAuth provider (env: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET)                                  
  - Kakao OAuth provider (env: KAKAO_CLIENT_ID, KAKAO_CLIENT_SECRET)                                     
  - JWT strategy                                                                                         
  - Session includes: id, nickname, role, coins, avatar_url                                              
  - callbacks: jwt (add custom fields), session (expose to client)                                       
                                                                                                         
  Create app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts                                                             
                                                                                                         
  ==============================================                                                         
  STEP 3 — Auth Pages                                                                                    
  ==============================================                                                         
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/login/page.tsx ---                                                                        
  Design:                                                                                                
  - Full screen dark bg with subtle cyan/pink radial glow (same vibe as other pages)                     
  - Centered glass card (backdrop-blur, border border-white/10)                                          
  - L'Oxygène logo + tagline at top                                                                      
  - Email input + Password input (toggle visibility button)                                              
  - "로그인" button (full width, cyan glow)                                                              
  - Divider "또는"                                                                                       
  - Social login buttons:                                                                                
    - 구글로 계속하기 (white bg, Google icon)                                                            
    - 카카오로 계속하기 (kakao yellow #FEE500, kakao logo)                                               
  - "비밀번호 찾기" link → /auth/forgot-password                                                         
  - "계정이 없으신가요? 회원가입" link → /auth/register                                                  
  - Error display: red toast/inline message for wrong credentials                                        
  - On success: redirect to / (or the page they came from using callbackUrl)                             
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/register/page.tsx ---                                                                     
  Multi-step form (3 steps with progress bar):                                                           
                                                                                                         
  Step 1 — 기본 정보:                                                                                    
  - Email input (real-time format validation)                                                            
  - Password input (strength indicator bar: 약함/보통/강함/매우강함)                                     
  - Password confirm input                                                                               
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 2 — 프로필 설정:                                                                                  
  - Nickname input (2–16자, Korean/English/numbers only, real-time availability check mock)              
  - Avatar selector: 6 preset avatar options (colored circle with emoji, selectable)                     
  - "다음" button                                                                                        
                                                                                                         
  Step 3 — 약관 동의:                                                                                    
  - 전체 동의 checkbox (checks all below)                                                                
  - [필수] 서비스 이용약관 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                       
  - [필수] 개인정보 처리방침 동의 (with "보기" link)                                                     
  - [선택] 마케팅 정보 수신 동의                                                                         
  - "가입 완료" button (disabled until required boxes checked)                                           
  - On submit: POST to /api/auth/register → success modal → redirect to /auth/login                      
                                                                                                         
  --- app/auth/forgot-password/page.tsx ---                                                              
  - Email input                                                                                          
  - "재설정 메일 발송" button

       86 +function KPICard({ label, value, sub, icon, color, trend }: { label: string; value: string; sub?: string; icon: string; color: string; trend?: "up" | 
          +"down" | "flat" }) {                                                                                                                                  
       87 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
       88 +    <div className="rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>
       89 +      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">                                                                                             
       90 +        <span className="text-xs text-white/40 font-medium tracking-wide">{label}</span>                                                              
       91 +        <div className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: `${color}15` }}>                                    
       92 +          <Icon icon={icon} className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color }} />                                                                                  
       93 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
       94 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
       95 +      <div>                                                                                                                                           
       96 +        <div className="text-2xl font-black text-white">{value}</div>                                                                                 
       97 +        {sub && (                                                                                                                                     
       98 +          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1">                                                                                              
       99 +            {trend === "up" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-up-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-green-400" />}                                                
      100 +            {trend === "down" && <Icon icon="solar:arrow-down-bold" className="w-3 h-3 text-red-400" />}                                              
      101 +            <span className="text-[11px]" style={{ color: trend === "up" ? SUCCESS : trend === "down" ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{sub}</spa
          +n>                                                                                                                                                    
      102 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      103 +        )}                                                                                                                                            
      104 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      105 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      106 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      107 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      108 +                                                                                                                                                      
      109 +function Badge({ text, color }: { text: string; color: string }) {                                                                                    
      110 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      111 +    <span className="text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: `${color}20`, border: `1px solid ${color}50`, color }}>     
      112 +      {text}                                                                                                                                          
      113 +    </span>                                                                                                                                           
      114 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      115 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      116 +                                                                                                                                                      
      117 +function StatusBadge({ status }: { status: string }) {                                                                                                
      118 +  const map: Record<string, [string, string]> = {                                                                                                     
      119 +    live: [SUCCESS, "LIVE"], ended: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "종료"], scheduled: [WARN, "예정"],                                                     
      120 +    active: [SUCCESS, "정상"], suspended: [WARN, "정지"], banned: [DANGER, "차단"],                                                                   
      121 +    pending: [WARN, "대기"], reviewed: [ACCENT, "검토완료"], dismissed: ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", "기각"],                                            
      122 +  };                                                                                                                                                  
      123 +  const [color, label] = map[status] ?? ["rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", status];                                                                            
      124 +  return <Badge text={label} color={color} />;                                                                                                        
      125 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      126 +                                                                                                                                                      
      127 +// ─── Tab: Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                    
      128 +function DashboardTab({ onForceEnd }: { onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                                                                         
      129 +  const liveRooms = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => r.status === "live");                                                                                      
      130 +  const totalLiveUsers = liveRooms.reduce((s, r) => s + r.participants, 0);                                                                           
      131 +  const todayRevenue = MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.filter(t => t.type === "charge").reduce((s, t) => s + t.amount, 0);                                          
      132 +                                                                                                                                                      
      133 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      134 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                                                                                             
      135 +      {/* KPIs */}                                                                                                                                    
      136 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">                                                                                         
      137 +        <KPICard label="총 유저" value="8,421" sub="+127 오늘" icon="solar:users-group-rounded-bold" color={ACCENT} trend="up" />                     
      138 +        <KPICard label="현재 접속" value={String(totalLiveUsers)} sub={`${liveRooms.length}개 방 활성`} icon="solar:pulse-2-bold" color={SUCCESS} tren
          +d="up" />                                                                                                                                             
      139 +        <KPICard label="오늘 수익" value={`₩${(todayRevenue * 10).toLocaleString()}`} sub="+18% vs 어제" icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" color={WARN} t
          +rend="up" />                                                                                                                                          
      140 +        <KPICard label="신고 대기" value={String(MOCK_REPORTS.filter(r => r.status === "pending").length)} sub="즉시 처리 필요" icon="solar:shield-war
          +ning-bold" color={DANGER} trend="flat" />                                                                                                             
      141 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      142 +                                                                                                                                                      
      143 +      {/* Active rooms table */}                                                                                                                      
      144 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>      
      145 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b flex items-center justify-between" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                    
      146 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">활성 룸</p>
