      154 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                    
      155 +                ))}                                                                                                                                   
      156 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                                         
      157 +              </tr>                                                                                                                                   
      158 +            </thead>                                                                                                                                  
      159 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                                   
      160 +              {liveRooms.map(room => (                                                                                                                
      161 +                <tr key={room.id} className="border-t transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.02]" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>     
      162 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/80 font-medium max-w-[160px] truncate">{room.title}</td>                                        
      163 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3"><Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} /></td>                                                            
      164 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.host}</td>                                                                            
      165 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                          
      166 +                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                                                                                         
      167 +                      <div className="flex-1 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/10 max-w-[60px]">                                                            
      168 +                        <div className="h-full rounded-full" style={{ width: `${(room.participants / room.maxParticipants) * 100}%`, background: ACCEN
          +T }} />                                                                                                                                               
      169 +                      </div>                                                                                                                          
      170 +                      <span className="text-white/50 whitespace-nowrap">{room.participants}/{room.maxParticipants}</span>                             
      171 +                    </div>                                                                                                                            
      172 +                  </td>                                                                                                                               
      173 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                            
      174 +                  <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                          
      175 +                    <button onClick={() => onForceEnd(room.id)}                                                                                       
      176 +                      className="px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                          
      177 +                      style={{ background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER }}>                                          
      178 +                      강제종료                                                                                                                        
      179 +                    </button>                                                                                                                         
      180 +                  </td>                                                                                                                               
      181 +                </tr>                                                                                                                                 
      182 +              ))}                                                                                                                                     
      183 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                                  
      184 +          </table>                                                                                                                                    
      185 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      186 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      187 +                                                                                                                                                      
      188 +      {/* Recent transactions */}                                                                                                                     
      189 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>      
      190 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                      
      191 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">최근 거래내역</p>                                                                               
      192 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      193 +        <div className="divide-y" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                                  
      194 +          {MOCK_TRANSACTIONS.map(tx => {                                                                                                              
      195 +            const typeColor = tx.type === "charge" ? SUCCESS : tx.type === "earn" ? ACCENT : tx.type === "settle" ? WARN : DANGER;                    
      196 +            const typeLabel = tx.type === "charge" ? "충전" : tx.type === "earn" ? "수익" : tx.type === "settle" ? "정산" : "지출";                   
      197 +            return (                                                                                                                                  
      198 +              <div key={tx.id} className="flex items-center gap-4 px-5 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors"                                  
      199 +                style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>                                                                            
      200 +                <Badge text={typeLabel} color={typeColor} />                                                                                          
      201 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                                                                                      
      202 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/70 truncate">{tx.user} — {tx.desc}</p>                                                             
      203 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      204 +                <span className="text-xs font-bold tabular-nums whitespace-nowrap" style={{ color: tx.amount > 0 ? SUCCESS : "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }
          +}>                                                                                                                                                    
      205 +                  {tx.amount > 0 ? "+" : ""}₩{(tx.amount * 10).toLocaleString()}                                                                      
      206 +                </span>                                                                                                                               
      207 +                <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25 whitespace-nowrap">{tx.at}</span>                                                          
      208 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      209 +            );                                                                                                                                        
      210 +          })}                                                                                                                                         
      211 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      212 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      213 +                                                                                                                                                      
      214 +      {/* Quick Actions */}                                                                                                                           
      215 +      <div>                                                                                                                                           
      216 +        <p className="text-xs font-bold text-white/40 tracking-wider mb-3">빠른 액션</p>                                                              
      217 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">                                                                                                        
      218 +          {[                                                                                                                                          
      219 +            { label: "공지 발송", icon: "solar:megaphone-bold", color: ACCENT },                                                                      
      220 +            { label: "전체 정지", icon: "solar:pause-circle-bold", color: WARN },                                                                     
      221 +            { label: "DB 백업", icon: "solar:database-bold", color: ACCENT2 },                                                                        
      222 +            { label: "캐시 초기화", icon: "solar:refresh-bold", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" },                                                     
      223 +          ].map(a => (                                                                                                                                
      224 +            <button key={a.label} className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all hover:opacity-80 active
          +:scale-95"                                                                                                                                            
      225 +              style={{ background: `${a.color}10`, border: `1px solid ${a.color}30`, color: a.color }}>                                               
      226 +              <Icon icon={a.icon} className="w-4 h-4" />                                                                                              
      227 +              {a.label}                                                                                                                               
      228 +            </button>                                                                                                                                 
      229 +          ))}                                                                                                                                         
      230 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      231 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      232 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      233 +  );
