      236 +// ─── Tab: 유저관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                   
      237 +function UsersTab() {                                                                                                                                 
      238 +  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");                                                                                                           
      239 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                           
      240 +  const [filterRole, setFilterRole] = useState("전체");                                                                                               
      241 +  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<User | null>(null);                                                                                
      242 +  const [users, setUsers] = useState(MOCK_USERS);                                                                                                     
      243 +                                                                                                                                                      
      244 +  const filtered = users.filter(u => {                                                                                                                
      245 +    const matchSearch = u.name.includes(search) || u.email.includes(search);                                                                          
      246 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || u.status === filterStatus;                                                                         
      247 +    const matchRole = filterRole === "전체" || u.role === filterRole;                                                                                 
      248 +    return matchSearch && matchStatus && matchRole;                                                                                                   
      249 +  });                                                                                                                                                 
      250 +                                                                                                                                                      
      251 +  const handleAction = (userId: string, action: "suspend" | "ban" | "restore") => {                                                                   
      252 +    setUsers(us => us.map(u => {                                                                                                                      
      253 +      if (u.id !== userId) return u;                                                                                                                  
      254 +      return { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" };                                       
      255 +    }));                                                                                                                                              
      256 +    if (selectedUser?.id === userId) {                                                                                                                
      257 +      setSelectedUser(u => u ? { ...u, status: action === "restore" ? "active" : action === "suspend" ? "suspended" : "banned" } : null);             
      258 +    }                                                                                                                                                 
      259 +  };                                                                                                                                                  
      260 +                                                                                                                                                      
      261 +  const memColor: Record<string, string> = { VVIP: "#FFD700", VIP: ACCENT, "일반": "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                         
      262 +  const roleColor: Record<string, string> = { admin: DANGER, host: ACCENT2, user: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                                          
      263 +                                                                                                                                                      
      264 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      265 +    <div className="flex gap-4 h-full">                                                                                                               
      266 +      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col gap-4 min-w-0">                                                                                            
      267 +        {/* Filters */}                                                                                                                               
      268 +        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                                                                                        
      269 +          <div className="relative flex-1 min-w-[180px]">                                                                                             
      270 +            <Icon icon="solar:magnifer-linear" className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-white/30" />                          
      271 +            <input value={search} onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)} placeholder="이름 또는 이메일 검색"                                       
      272 +              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm text-white outline-none"                                                          
      273 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", caretColor: ACCENT }} />                      
      274 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      275 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                              
      276 +            {["전체", "active", "suspended", "banned"].map(s => (                                                                                     
      277 +              <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                      
      278 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                   
      279 +                style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,25
          +5,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                          
      280 +                {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "active" ? "정상" : s === "suspended" ? "정지" : "차단"}                                               
      281 +              </button>                                                                                                                               
      282 +            ))}                                                                                                                                       
      283 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      284 +          <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                              
      285 +            {["전체", "user", "host", "admin"].map(r => (                                                                                             
      286 +              <button key={r} onClick={() => setFilterRole(r)}                                                                                        
      287 +                className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                   
      288 +                style={filterRole === r ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(255,2
          +55,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                         
      289 +                {r === "전체" ? "전체" : r === "user" ? "유저" : r === "host" ? "호스트" : "관리자"}                                                  
      290 +              </button>                                                                                                                               
      291 +            ))}                                                                                                                                       
      292 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      293 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      294 +                                                                                                                                                      
      295 +        {/* Table */}                                                                                                                                 
      296 +        <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex-1" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" 
          +}}>                                                                                                                                                   
      297 +          <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                           
      298 +            <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                        
      299 +              <thead>                                                                                                                                 
      300 +                <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                                     
      301 +                  {["이름", "이메일", "역할", "멤버십", "잔액", "방 수", "신고", "상태", "가입일"].map(h => (                                         
      302 +                    <th key={h} className="text-left px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                  
      303 +                  ))}                                                                                                                                 
      304 +                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                                       
      305 +                </tr>                                                                                                                                 
      306 +              </thead>                                                                                                                                
      307 +              <tbody>                                                                                                                                 
      308 +                {filtered.map(u => (                                                                                                                  
      309 +                  <tr key={u.id}                                                                                                                      
      310 +                    onClick={() => setSelectedUser(u)}                                                                                                
      311 +                    className="border-t cursor-pointer transition-colors hover:bg-white/[0.03]"                                                       
      312 +                    style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", background: selectedUser?.id === u.id ? "rgba(0,229,255,0.04)" : undefined }}>    
      313 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium text-white/85">{u.name}</td>                                                                 
      314 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/40 max-w-[140px] truncate">{u.email}</td>                                                     
      315 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><Badge text={u.role === "admin" ? "관리자" : u.role === "host" ? "호스트" : "유저"} color={roleColor[u.r
          +ole]} /></td>                                                                                                                                         
      316 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><Badge text={u.membership} color={memColor[u.membership]} /></td>                                       
      317 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-white/60">₩{(u.balance * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                       
      318 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/50">{u.rooms}</td>                                                                            
      319 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3" style={{ color: u.reports > 0 ? DANGER : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" }}>{u.reports}</td>                    
      320 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3"><StatusBadge status={u.status} /></td>                                                                  
      321 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-white/30">{u.joined}</td>                                                                           
      322 +                    <td className="px-4 py-3">                                                                                                        
      323 +                      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                  
      324 +                        {u.status === "active" && (                                                                                                   
      325 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "suspend"); }}                                              
      326 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                    
      327 +                            style={{ background: `${WARN}15`, border: `1px solid ${WARN}40`, color: WARN }}>정지</button>                             
      328 +                        )}                                                                                                                            
      329 +                        {u.status !== "banned" && (                                                                                                   
      330 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "ban"); }}                                                  
      331 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                    
      332 +                            style={{ background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER }}>차단</button>                       
      333 +                        )}                                                                                                                            
      334 +                        {u.status !== "active" && (                                                                                                   
      335 +                          <button onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAction(u.id, "restore"); }}                                              
      336 +                            className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg text-[10px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                    
      337 +                            style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>복구</button>                    
      338 +                        )}                                                                                                                            
      339 +                      </div>                                                                                                                          
      340 +                    </td>                                                                                                                             
      341 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                               
      342 +                ))}                                                                                                                                   
      343 +              </tbody>                                                                                                                                
      344 +            </table>                                                                                                                                  
      345 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      346 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      347 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      348 +                                                                                                                                                      
      349 +      {/* User detail panel */}                                                                                                                       
      350 +      {selectedUser && (                                                                                                                              
      351 +        <div className="w-72 flex-shrink-0 rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-4 self-start sticky top-0"                                               
      352 +          style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" }}>                                               
      353 +          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">                                                                                          
      354 +            <div>                                                                                                                                     
      355 +              <p className="font-bold text-white">{selectedUser.name}</p>                                                                             
      356 +              <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{selectedUser.email}</p>                                                                    
      357 +            </div>                                                                                                                                    
      358 +            <button onClick={() => setSelectedUser(null)} className="text-white/30 hover:text-white/60">                                              
      359 +              <Icon icon="solar:close-circle-bold" className="w-5 h-5" />                                                                             
      360 +            </button>                                                                                                                                 
      361 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      362 +          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">                                                                                                      
      363 +            <StatusBadge status={selectedUser.status} />                                                                                              
      364 +            <Badge text={selectedUser.membership} color={memColor[selectedUser.membership]} />                                                        
      365 +            <Badge text={selectedUser.role === "host" ? "호스트" : selectedUser.role === "admin" ? "관리자" : "유저"} color={roleColor[selectedUser.ro
          +le]} />                                                                                                                                               
      366 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      367 +          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 text-xs">                                                                                               
      368 +            {[                                                                                                                                        
      369 +              ["잔액", `₩${(selectedUser.balance * 10).toLocaleString()}`],                                                                           
      370 +              ["개설 룸 수", `${selectedUser.rooms}개`],                                                                                              
      371 +              ["신고 횟수", `${selectedUser.reports}회`],                                                                                             
      372 +              ["가입일", selectedUser.joined],                                                                                                        
      373 +            ].map(([k, v]) => (                                                                                                                       
      374 +              <div key={k} className="flex justify-between">                                                                                          
      375 +                <span className="text-white/30">{k}</span>                                                                                            
      376 +                <span className="text-white/70 font-medium">{v}</span>                                                                                
      377 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      378 +            ))}                                                                                                                                       
      379 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      380 +          <div className="pt-2 border-t flex flex-col gap-2" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                       
      381 +            <p className="text-[10px] text-white/30 tracking-wider font-medium">계정 관리</p>                                                         
      382 +            {selectedUser.status === "active" && (                                                                                                    
      383 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "suspend")}                                                                        
      384 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                                  
      385 +                style={{ background: `${WARN}15`, border: `1px solid ${WARN}40`, color: WARN }}>계정 정지</button>                                    
      386 +            )}                                                                                                                                        
      387 +            {selectedUser.status !== "banned" && (                                                                                                    
      388 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "ban")}                                                                            
      389 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                                  
      390 +                style={{ background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER }}>강제 탈퇴</button>                              
      391 +            )}                                                                                                                                        
      392 +            {selectedUser.status !== "active" && (                                                                                                    
      393 +              <button onClick={() => handleAction(selectedUser.id, "restore")}                                                                        
      394 +                className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                                  
      395 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>계정 복구</button>                           
      396 +            )}                                                                                                                                        
      397 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      398 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      399 +      )}                                                                                                                                              
      400 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      401 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      402 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      403 +                                                                                                                                                      
      404 +// ─── Tab: 룸관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                     
      405 +function RoomsTab({ terminatedRooms, onForceEnd }: { terminatedRooms: Set<string>; onForceEnd: (id: string) => void }) {                              
      406 +  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState("전체");                                                                                               
      407 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                           
      408 +                                                                                                                                                      
      409 +  const filtered = MOCK_ROOMS.filter(r => {                                                                                                           
      410 +    const matchType = filterType === "전체" || r.type === filterType;                                                                                 
      411 +    const status = terminatedRooms.has(r.id) ? "ended" : r.status;                                                                                    
      412 +    const matchStatus = filterStatus === "전체" || status === filterStatus;                                                                           
      413 +    return matchType && matchStatus;                                                                                                                  
      414 +  });                                                                                                                                                 
      415 +                                                                                                                                                      
      416 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      417 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                                                                                             
      418 +      {/* Filters */}                                                                                                                                 
      419 +      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">                                                                                                          
      420 +        <div className="flex gap-1.5 flex-wrap">                                                                                                      
      421 +          {["전체", "DJ", "토크쇼", "버라이어티", "가라오케"].map(t => (                                                                              
      422 +            <button key={t} onClick={() => setFilterType(t)}                                                                                          
      423 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                     
      424 +              style={filterType === t ? { background: `${ACCENT}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}40`, color: ACCENT } : { background: "rgba(255,255,25
          +5,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                              
      425 +              {t}                                                                                                                                     
      426 +            </button>                                                                                                                                 
      427 +          ))}                                                                                                                                         
      428 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      429 +        <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                                
      430 +          {["전체", "live", "scheduled", "ended"].map(s => (                                                                                          
      431 +            <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                        
      432 +              className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                     
      433 +              style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${ACCENT2}15`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT2}40`, color: ACCENT2 } : { background: "rgba(255,2
          +55,255,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                         
      434 +              {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "live" ? "라이브" : s === "scheduled" ? "예정" : "종료"}                                                 
      435 +            </button>                                                                                                                                 
      436 +          ))}                                                                                                                                         
      437 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      438 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      439 +                                                                                                                                                      
      440 +      {/* Active rooms grid */}                                                                                                                       
      441 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                                                                          
      442 +        {filtered.map(room => {                                                                                                                       
      443 +          const isTerminated = terminatedRooms.has(room.id);                                                                                          
      444 +          const status = isTerminated ? "ended" : room.status;                                                                                        
      445 +          return (                                                                                                                                    
      446 +            <div key={room.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"                                                                        
      447 +              style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${status === "live" ? `${ACCENT}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}>  
      448 +              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">                                                                                
      449 +                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">                                                                                                      
      450 +                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">                                                                                      
      451 +                    <StatusBadge status={status} />                                                                                                   
      452 +                    <Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} />                                                                                         
      453 +                  </div>                                                                                                                              
      454 +                  <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white/85 leading-snug">{room.title}</p>                                                        
      455 +                  <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{room.host} · 시작 {room.started}</p>                                                   
      456 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      457 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      458 +              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-white/40">                                                                         
      459 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">                                                                                             
      460 +                  <Icon icon="solar:users-group-two-rounded-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />                                                          
      461 +                  <span>{room.participants}/{room.maxParticipants}</span>                                                                             
      462 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      463 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">                                                                                             
      464 +                  <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" style={{ color: WARN }} />                                             
      465 +                  <span style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</span>                                                        
      466 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      467 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      468 +              {/* Participant bar */}                                                                                                                 
      469 +              <div className="h-1.5 rounded-full bg-white/10">                                                                                        
      470 +                <div className="h-full rounded-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${(room.participants / room.maxParticipants) * 100}%`, background
          +: status === "live" ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" }} />                                                                                         
      471 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      472 +              {status === "live" && (                                                                                                                 
      473 +                <button onClick={() => onForceEnd(room.id)}                                                                                           
      474 +                  className="w-full py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                                
      475 +                  style={{ background: `${DANGER}12`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}35`, color: DANGER }}>                                              
      476 +                  강제 종료                                                                                                                           
      477 +                </button>                                                                                                                             
      478 +              )}                                                                                                                                      
      479 +            </div>                                                                                                                                    
      480 +          );                                                                                                                                          
      481 +        })}                                                                                                                                           
      482 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      483 +                                                                                                                                                      
      484 +      {/* Room history */}                                                                                                                            
      485 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>      
      486 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                                                      
      487 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">오늘의 룸 히스토리</p>                                                                          
      488 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      489 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                             
      490 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                          
      491 +            <thead>                                                                                                                                   
      492 +              <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>                                                                       
      493 +                {["제목", "유형", "호스트", "시작", "참여자", "수익", "상태"].map(h => (                                                              
      494 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                    
      495 +                ))}                                                                                                                                   
      496 +              </tr>                                                                                                                                   
      497 +            </thead>                                                                                                                                  
      498 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                                   
      499 +              {MOCK_ROOMS.map(room => {                                                                                                               
      500 +                const status = terminatedRooms.has(room.id) ? "ended" : room.status;                                                                  
      501 +                return (                                                                                                                              
      502 +                  <tr key={room.id} className="border-t hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>   
      503 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/75 max-w-[150px] truncate">{room.title}</td>                                                  
      504 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3"><Badge text={room.type} color={ACCENT} /></td>                                                          
      505 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.host}</td>                                                                          
      506 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/40">{room.started}</td>                                                                       
      507 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 text-white/50">{room.participants}명</td>                                                                
      508 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(room.revenue * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                          
      509 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3"><StatusBadge status={status} /></td>                                                                    
      510 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                               
      511 +                );                                                                                                                                    
      512 +              })}                                                                                                                                     
      513 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                                  
      514 +          </table>                                                                                                                                    
      515 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      516 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      517 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      518 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      519 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      520 +                                                                                                                                                      
      521 +// ─── Tab: 정산관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                   
      522 +function SettlementsTab() {                                                                                                                           
      523 +  const [settled, setSettled] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());                                                                                     
      524 +  const [confirmId, setConfirmId] = useState<string | null>(null);                                                                                    
      525 +                                                                                                                                                      
      526 +  const hosts = MOCK_USERS.filter(u => u.role === "host");                                                                                            
      527 +  const totalPending = hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).reduce((s, h) => s + Math.floor(h.balance * 0.3), 0);                                    
      528 +                                                                                                                                                      
      529 +  const doSettle = (id: string) => {                                                                                                                  
      530 +    setSettled(s => new Set([...s, id]));                                                                                                             
      531 +    setConfirmId(null);                                                                                                                               
      532 +  };                                                                                                                                                  
      533 +                                                                                                                                                      
      534 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      535 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-6">                                                                                                             
      536 +      {/* Summary */}                                                                                                                                 
      537 +      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4">                                                                                         
      538 +        <KPICard label="정산 대기" value={`₩${(totalPending * 10).toLocaleString()}`} sub={`${hosts.filter(h => !settled.has(h.id)).length}명`} icon="
          +solar:clock-circle-bold" color={WARN} />                                                                                                              
      539 +        <KPICard label="이번 달 완료" value={`₩${(2_450_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub="18건 처리" icon="solar:check-circle-bold" color={SUCCESS} />    
      540 +        <KPICard label="플랫폼 수익 (50%)" value={`₩${(1_225_000).toLocaleString()}`} sub="이번 달" icon="solar:graph-up-bold" color={ACCENT} />      
      541 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      542 +                                                                                                                                                      
      543 +      {/* Distribution note */}                                                                                                                       
      544 +      <div className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex gap-3 items-start" style={{ background: `${ACCENT}08`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}20` }}>                 
      545 +        <Icon icon="solar:info-circle-bold" className="w-4 h-4 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" style={{ color: ACCENT }} />                                     
      546 +        <div className="text-xs text-white/50">                                                                                                       
      547 +          <span className="font-bold text-white/70">수익 분배 구조: </span>                                                                           
      548 +          플랫폼 50% · 감독/PD 20% · 호스트 30%.                                                                                                      
      549 +          각 정산건은 월말 기준 익월 5일 이내 처리됩니다.                                                                                             
      550 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      551 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      552 +                                                                                                                                                      
      553 +      {/* Pending settlements table */}                                                                                                               
      554 +      <div className="rounded-2xl overflow-hidden" style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>      
      555 +        <div className="px-5 py-3.5 border-b flex items-center justify-between" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }}>                    
      556 +          <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">호스트 정산 내역</p>                                                                            
      557 +          <button className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                      
      558 +            style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}12`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}30`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                                 
      559 +            <Icon icon="solar:download-bold" className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />전체 내보내기                                                                  
      560 +          </button>                                                                                                                                   
      561 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      562 +        <div className="overflow-x-auto">                                                                                                             
      563 +          <table className="w-full text-xs">                                                                                                          
      564 +            <thead>                                                                                                                                   
      565 +              <tr style={{ borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)" }}>                                                                       
      566 +                {["호스트", "멤버십", "총 수익", "호스트 몫 (30%)", "정산 상태"].map(h => (                                                           
      567 +                  <th key={h} className="text-left px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{h}</th>                                    
      568 +                ))}                                                                                                                                   
      569 +                <th className="px-5 py-3 text-white/30 font-medium">액션</th>                                                                         
      570 +              </tr>                                                                                                                                   
      571 +            </thead>                                                                                                                                  
      572 +            <tbody>                                                                                                                                   
      573 +              {hosts.map(host => {                                                                                                                    
      574 +                const gross = host.balance;                                                                                                           
      575 +                const hostCut = Math.floor(gross * 0.3);                                                                                              
      576 +                const isSettled = settled.has(host.id);                                                                                               
      577 +                return (                                                                                                                              
      578 +                  <tr key={host.id} className="border-t hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-colors" style={{ borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)" }}>   
      579 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-medium text-white/85">{host.name}</td>                                                              
      580 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                        
      581 +                      <Badge text={host.membership} color={host.membership === "VVIP" ? "#FFD700" : host.membership === "VIP" ? ACCENT : "rgba(255,255
          +,255,0.4)"} />                                                                                                                                        
      582 +                    </td>                                                                                                                             
      583 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono text-white/60">₩{(gross * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                                           
      584 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3 font-mono font-bold" style={{ color: WARN }}>₩{(hostCut * 10).toLocaleString()}</td>                     
      585 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                        
      586 +                      <StatusBadge status={isSettled ? "reviewed" : "pending"} />                                                                     
      587 +                    </td>                                                                                                                             
      588 +                    <td className="px-5 py-3">                                                                                                        
      589 +                      {!isSettled ? (                                                                                                                 
      590 +                        <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(host.id)}                                                                                 
      591 +                          className="px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80 active:scale-95"                      
      592 +                          style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}40`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                   
      593 +                          정산처리                                                                                                                    
      594 +                        </button>                                                                                                                     
      595 +                      ) : (                                                                                                                           
      596 +                        <span className="text-[11px] text-white/30">완료</span>                                                                       
      597 +                      )}                                                                                                                              
      598 +                    </td>                                                                                                                             
      599 +                  </tr>                                                                                                                               
      600 +                );                                                                                                                                    
      601 +              })}                                                                                                                                     
      602 +            </tbody>                                                                                                                                  
      603 +          </table>                                                                                                                                    
      604 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      605 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      606 +                                                                                                                                                      
      607 +      {/* Confirm modal */}                                                                                                                           
      608 +      {confirmId && (                                                                                                                                 
      609 +        <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center px-4" style={{ background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.85)", backdropFilter: "blur(12px)
          +" }}>                                                                                                                                                 
      610 +          <div className="w-full max-w-sm rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-5" style={{ background: "rgba(4,10,18,0.98)", border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS
          +}30` }}>                                                                                                                                              
      611 +            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">                                                                                                 
      612 +              <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15` }}>                          
      613 +                <Icon icon="solar:wallet-money-bold" className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color: SUCCESS }} />                                                
      614 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      615 +              <div>                                                                                                                                   
      616 +                <p className="text-sm font-bold text-white">정산 처리 확인</p>                                                                        
      617 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40 mt-0.5">{hosts.find(h => h.id === confirmId)?.name}</p>                                           
      618 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      619 +            </div>                                                                                                                                    
      620 +            <p className="text-xs text-white/50 leading-relaxed">                                                                                     
      621 +              위 호스트에 대한 이번 달 정산을 처리합니다.                                                                                             
      622 +              정산 후 취소가 불가합니다. 계속하시겠습니까?                                                                                            
      623 +            </p>                                                                                                                                      
      624 +            <div className="flex gap-3">                                                                                                              
      625 +              <button onClick={() => setConfirmId(null)}                                                                                              
      626 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"                                                                 
      627 +                style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.5)" }}>          
      628 +                취소                                                                                                                                  
      629 +              </button>                                                                                                                               
      630 +              <button onClick={() => doSettle(confirmId)}                                                                                             
      631 +                className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all active:scale-95"                                                 
      632 +                style={{ background: `${SUCCESS}15`, border: `1px solid ${SUCCESS}50`, color: SUCCESS }}>                                             
      633 +                정산 처리                                                                                                                             
      634 +              </button>                                                                                                                               
      635 +            </div>                                                                                                                                    
      636 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      637 +        </div>                                                                                                                                        
      638 +      )}                                                                                                                                              
      639 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      640 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      641 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      642 +                                                                                                                                                      
      643 +// ─── Tab: 신고관리 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                   
      644 +function ReportsTab() {                                                                                                                               
      645 +  const [reports, setReports] = useState(MOCK_REPORTS);                                                                                               
      646 +  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState("전체");                                                                                           
      647 +                                                                                                                                                      
      648 +  const filtered = filterStatus === "전체" ? reports : reports.filter(r => r.status === filterStatus);                                                
      649 +                                                                                                                                                      
      650 +  const updateStatus = (id: string, status: "reviewed" | "dismissed") => {                                                                            
      651 +    setReports(rs => rs.map(r => r.id === id ? { ...r, status } : r));                                                                                
      652 +  };                                                                                                                                                  
      653 +                                                                                                                                                      
      654 +  const catColor: Record<string, string> = { spam: WARN, abuse: DANGER, inappropriate: "#F97316", other: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" };                   
      655 +  const catLabel: Record<string, string> = { spam: "스팸", abuse: "괴롭힘", inappropriate: "부적절", other: "기타" };                                 
      656 +                                                                                                                                                      
      657 +  return (                                                                                                                                            
      658 +    <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">                                                                                                             
      659 +      <div className="flex gap-1.5">                                                                                                                  
      660 +        {["전체", "pending", "reviewed", "dismissed"].map(s => (                                                                                      
      661 +          <button key={s} onClick={() => setFilterStatus(s)}                                                                                          
      662 +            className="px-3 py-2 rounded-xl text-xs font-medium transition-all"                                                                       
      663 +            style={filterStatus === s ? { background: `${DANGER}15`, border: `1px solid ${DANGER}40`, color: DANGER } : { background: "rgba(255,255,25
          +5,0.03)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>                                                              
      664 +            {s === "전체" ? "전체" : s === "pending" ? "대기" : s === "reviewed" ? "검토완료" : "기각"}                                               
      665 +          </button>                                                                                                                                   
      666 +        ))}                                                                                                                                           
      667 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      668 +                                                                                                                                                      
      669 +      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">                                                                                                           
      670 +        {filtered.map(r => (                                                                                                                          
      671 +          <div key={r.id} className="rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-3"                                                                             
      672 +            style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: `1px solid ${r.status === "pending" ? `${DANGER}20` : "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)"}` }}
          +>                                                                                                                                                     
      673 +            <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">                                                                        
      674 +              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">                                                                                                   
      675 +                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">                                                                                             
      676 +                  <Badge text={catLabel[r.category]} color={catColor[r.category]} />                                                                  
      677 +                  <StatusBadge status={r.status} />                                                                                                   
      678 +                  <span className="text-[11px] text-white/25">{r.at}</span>                                                                           
      679 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      680 +                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white/80">{r.reason}</p>                                                                       
      681 +                <p className="text-xs text-white/40">                                                                                                 
      682 +                  <span className="text-white/60">{r.reporter}</span> → <span style={{ color: DANGER }}>{r.target}</span>                             
      683 +                </p>                                                                                                                                  
      684 +              </div>                                                                                                                                  
      685 +              {r.status === "pending" && (                                                                                                            
      686 +                <div className="flex gap-2">                                                                                                          
      687 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "reviewed")}                                                                              
      688 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                              
      689 +                    style={{ background: `${ACCENT}12`, border: `1px solid ${ACCENT}35`, color: ACCENT }}>                                            
      690 +                    검토 완료                                                                                                                         
      691 +                  </button>                                                                                                                           
      692 +                  <button onClick={() => updateStatus(r.id, "dismissed")}                                                                             
      693 +                    className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold transition-all hover:opacity-80"                                              
      694 +                    style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" }}>      
      695 +                    기각                                                                                                                              
      696 +                  </button>                                                                                                                           
      697 +                </div>                                                                                                                                
      698 +              )}                                                                                                                                      
      699 +            </div>                                                                                                                                    
      700 +          </div>                                                                                                                                      
      701 +        ))}                                                                                                                                           
      702 +        {filtered.length === 0 && (                                                                                                                   
      703 +          <div className="text-center py-12 text-white/20 text-sm">신고 내역이 없습니다</div>                                                         
      704 +        )}                                                                                                                                            
      705 +      </div>                                                                                                                                          
      706 +    </div>                                                                                                                                            
      707 +  );                                                                                                                                                  
      708 +}                                                                                                                                                     
      709 +                                                                                                                                                      
      710 +// ─── Tab: 시스템설정 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────                                                                  
      711 +function SystemSettingsTab() {                                                                                                                        
      712 +  const [maintenance, setMaintenance] = useState(false);                                                                                              
      713 +  const [newUserReg, setNewUserReg] = useState(true);                                                                                                 
      714 +  const [roomCreation, setRoomCreation] = useState(true);                                                                                             
      715 +  const [maxRoomSize, setMaxRoomSize] = useState(500);                                                                                                
      716 +  const [maxRooms, setMaxRooms] = useState(50);

  sliders + danger zone)

  - /admin/settlements — full settlement table with per-row and batch processing, confirmation modals
